Legalization aims at minimizing the total and maximum displacement to maintain the quality of global placement on the premise of no violation of the physical circuit constraint. In this article, we propose a two-stage legalization approach (NGLIC) for nonaligned-row interdie connections. In the initial stage, a single-row height legalization algorithm is used for dense placement. Afterward, the unequal multirow height legalization (UML) is designed for sparse placement in the post-optimization stage. A pruning scheme is adopted to identify and eliminate redundant computations. The performance, effectiveness, and configuration are analyzed empirically based on ICCAD 2022 benchmarks. Compared to the state-of-the-art multirow or single-row height legalization, our approach outperforms well-known algorithms, such as multirow global legalization (MGL) and Abacus by at least 24% averaged total displacement, 3% averaged maximum displacement, and 31% averaged HPWL Growth. Our case study also illustrates the effectiveness of UML and NGLIC. In addition, the effectiveness of pruning is also validated by experiments that show savings of 33% redundant computations.
items.abstract_zh: 3-D 放置是 3-D 物理合成中的一个重要阶段。除了需要将标准单元或宏放置在芯片内部之外，还需要考虑芯片间连接的放置。随着芯片间连接的密度逐渐增加，它们的放置变得更加关键。然而，与标准单元不同，芯片间连接不需要排列成行，这导致了更大的合法化解决方案空间。合法化的目的是在不违反物理电路约束的前提下，尽量减少总位移和最大位移，以维持全局布局的质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于非对齐行芯片间连接的两阶段合法化方法（NGLIC）。初期采用单行高度合法化算法进行密集布局。随后，设计了不等多行高度合法化（UML），用于优化后阶段的稀疏布局。采用剪枝方案来识别和消除冗余计算。基于 ICCAD 2022 基准对性能、有效性和配置进行了实证分析。与最先进的多行或单行高度合法化相比，我们的方法优于多行全局合法化 (MGL) 和 Abacus 等著名算法，平均总位移至少提高 24%，平均最大位移提高 3%，平均 HPWL 增长提高 31%。我们的案例研究还说明了 UML 和 NGLIC 的有效性。此外，剪枝的有效性也通过实验得到了验证，结果表明节省了 33% 的冗余计算。

items.title: Hierarchical Mapping of Large-Scale Spiking Convolutional Neural Networks Onto Resource-Constrained Neuromorphic Processor.
items.abstract: Neuromorphic processors have been designed as nonvon Neumann systems for energy-efficient spiking neural network (SNN) execution. Spiking convolutional neural networks (SCNNs), combining the advantage of convolutional neural network (CNN) and SNN, have been widely applied to vision tasks. However, as the scale of SCNNs increases, executing large-scale SCNNs on resource-constrained neuromorphic processor faces many challenges, including massive synapse pruning, caused by resource competition, execution performance degradation, etc. Addressing these problems, we propose an efficient approach to map large-scale SCNNs onto resource-constrined neuromorphic processor. The approach consists of three steps: 1) splitting; 2) partitioning; and 3) mapping. We explore three acyclic splitting strategies to divide large-scale SCNNs into subnetworks without cyclic dependency. Axon sharing is the guiding principle to partition subnetworks into multiple clusters. To obtain an optimal cluster-to-core mapping scheme, we use nondominated sorting genetic algorithm to collaboratively optimize two metrics. We evaluate our approach with eight realistic SCNN applications. The results show that compared with existing state-of-the-art methods, our approach significantly reduces the synapse pruning and accuracy loss, and increases the execution performance.
items.abstract_zh: 神经形态处理器被设计为非冯诺依曼系统，用于节能尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 执行。脉冲卷积神经网络（SCNN）结合了卷积神经网络（CNN）和SNN的优点，已广泛应用于视觉任务。然而，随着SCNN规模的增加，在资源受限的神经拟态处理器上执行大规模SCNN面临着许多挑战，包括由于资源竞争、执行性能下降等引起的大规模突触修剪。针对这些问题，我们提出了一种将大规模SCNN映射到资源受限的神经拟态处理器上的有效方法。该方法包括三个步骤：1）分裂； 2）分区； 3) 映射。我们探索了三种非循环分割策略，将大规模 SCNN 划分为没有循环依赖的子网络。轴突共享是将子网络划分为多个簇的指导原则。为了获得最佳的簇到核心的映射方案，我们使用非支配排序遗传算法来协同优化两个指标。我们用八个实际的 SCNN 应用来评估我们的方法。结果表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，我们的方法显着减少了突触修剪和准确性损失，并提高了执行性能。

items.title: FS-TRA: Evaluating Sequential Circuit Reliability via a Fanout-Source Tracking and Reduction Approach.
items.abstract: The input vector-oriented reliability estimation of sequential circuits plays an important role in predicting their reliability boundaries and identifying their reliability-critical gates. This article presents an input vector-oriented programmable method based on fanout-source tracking and reduction for the reliability evaluation of sequential circuits. In the proposed method, fanout-source tracking is introduced to track fanout sources of a computing node to determine the fanout sources affecting the node output signals. An iterative reduction method is presented to eliminate duplicate calculations caused by fanout reconvergences without reducing the accuracy. A dynamic fanout relevance-keeping-based calculation method is used to approximate the trend probability vector of low-priority nodes outputting “0” and “1” to accelerate the calculations at a small accuracy loss. A complexity-accuracy tradeoff method based on a programmable fanout source length is designed to facilitate reasonable calculations as needed. Experimental results on large-scale circuits show that the average relative error of the proposed method is 1.01% with Monte Carlo (MC) as a reference. Moreover, the proposed method is 4,308.13 times faster than the MC on average, but its average memory cost is 3.40 higher than that of the MC model. Compared with similar methods, the proposed method not only is suitable for large-scale circuits and performs better in accuracy, but also enables programmable computation to dynamically balance the tradeoff between accuracy and speed as actual needed, resulting in better applicability and scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 时序电路的面向输入向量的可靠性估计在预测其可靠性边界和识别其可靠性关键门方面发挥着重要作用。本文提出了一种基于扇出源跟踪和缩减的面向输入向量的可编程方法，用于时序电路的可靠性评估。在所提出的方法中，引入扇出源跟踪来跟踪计算节点的扇出源，以确定影响节点输出信号的扇出源。提出了一种迭代缩减方法，在不降低精度的情况下消除由扇出再收敛引起的重复计算。采用基于动态扇出相关性保持的计算方法来近似低优先级节点输出“0”和“1”的趋势概率向量，以在精度损失较小的情况下加速计算。设计了一种基于可编程扇出源长度的复杂性与精度权衡方法，以方便根据需要进行合理的计算。大规模电路实验结果表明，以蒙特卡罗(MC)为参考，该方法的平均相对误差为1.01%。此外，该方法平均比MC模型快4,308.13倍，但其平均内存成本比MC模型高3.40倍。与同类方法相比，该方法不仅适合大规模电路，精度更高，而且可以使可编程计算根据实际需要动态平衡精度和速度之间的权衡，从而具有更好的适用性和可扩展性。

items.title: An MIV Test Method Using High-Precision Voltage Dividers.
items.abstract: Monolithic 3-D integration realizes the vertical interconnection between adjacent layers by using nanoscale monolithic intertier vias (MIVs). However, MIVs are particularly vulnerable to defects due to high integration density and substantial scaling of the interlayer dielectric. We propose a novel test method to detect open, short, and leakage faults in MIVs. Since the MIV defect will change its electrical characteristics, this method can test the MIV by identifying the voltage range divided according to different MIV faults. The effectiveness of fault detection is verified through HSPICE simulations. We also perform Monte Carlo simulations to prove the testability of the proposed method even in the case of process variations. Experimental results show that the proposed method has high detection precision while ensuring low hardware overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 单片 3D 集成通过使用纳米级单片层间通孔 (MIV) 实现相邻层之间的垂直互连。然而，由于高集成密度和层间电介质的大量缩放，MIV 特别容易受到缺陷的影响。我们提出了一种新颖的测试方法来检测 MIV 中的开路、短路和泄漏故障。由于MIV缺陷会改变其电气特性，因此该方法可以通过识别根据不同MIV故障划分的电压范围来测试MIV。通过HSPICE仿真验证了故障检测的有效性。我们还进行了蒙特卡洛模拟，以证明所提出的方法即使在过程变化的情况下也具有可测试性。实验结果表明，该方法在保证较低硬件开销的同时具有较高的检测精度。

items.title: Multicorner Timing Analysis Acceleration for Iterative Physical Design of ICs.
items.abstract: We propose a multicorner multistage timing analysis prediction framework using a generalized linear model with latent features. We then further improve such methods using kernel trick extension, transfer learning with knowledge from previous designs, and multioutput feature engineering to deliver state-of-the-art (SOTA) prediction accuracy with very limited training data. Most importantly, our method is equipped with a Bayesian decision strategy to deliver reliable predictions with accuracy close to 100%, pushing the frontier of the machine-learning-based static timing analysis (STA) for practical implementation in the industry environment, where reliability is highly desired. Experimental results show that the accuracy of our proposed method outperforms the SOTA competitors by up to 4x and can improve prediction accuracy to 100% with little extra STA executions.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用具有潜在特征的广义线性模型的多角多级时序分析预测框架。然后，我们使用内核技巧扩展、利用先前设计的知识进行迁移学习以及多输出特征工程来进一步改进此类方法，以在非常有限的训练数据下提供最先进的 (SOTA) 预测精度。最重要的是，我们的方法配备了贝叶斯决策策略，可以提供准确度接近 100% 的可靠预测，推动基于机器学习的静态时序分析 (STA) 的前沿，以便在高度需要可靠性的工业环境中实际实施。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法的准确性比 SOTA 竞争对手高出 4 倍，并且可以将预测准确性提高到 100%，而几乎不需要额外的 STA 执行。

items.title: ATA-Cache: Contention Mitigation for GPU Shared L1 Cache With Aggregated Tag Array.
items.abstract: To fully exploit the locality of GPU applications, the GPU shared L1 cache architecture, which shares L1 cache among multiple GPU cores, is a promising architecture while still suffering from high-resource contentions. We present a GPU shared L1 cache architecture with an aggregated tag array that minimizes the L1 cache contentions and takes full advantage of inter-core locality. The key idea is to decouple and aggregate the tag arrays of multiple L1 caches so that the cache requests can be compared with all tag arrays in parallel to probe the replicated data in other caches. The GPU caches are only accessed by other GPU cores when replicated data exists, filtering out unnecessary cache accesses that cause high-resource contentions. We also develop a two-level thread-block scheduling policy adapted for the shared L1 cache architecture to maximize the available locality. The experimental results show that GPU performance can be improved by 14.5% on average for applications with a high inter-core locality.
items.abstract_zh: 为了充分利用 GPU 应用程序的局部性，GPU 共享 L1 缓存架构（在多个 GPU 核心之间共享 L1 缓存）是一种很有前景的架构，但仍然面临着高资源争用的问题。我们提出了一种 GPU 共享 L1 缓存架构，具有聚合标签阵列，可最大限度地减少 L1 缓存争用并充分利用核心间局部性。关键思想是解耦和聚合多个L1缓存的标签数组，以便缓存请求可以与所有标签数组并行比较，以探测其他缓存中的复制数据。仅当存在复制数据时，GPU 缓存才会被其他 GPU 核心访问，从而过滤掉导致高资源争用的不必要的缓存访问。我们还开发了适合共享一级缓存架构的两级线程块调度策略，以最大化可用局部性。实验结果表明，对于核心间局部性较高的应用，GPU性能平均可提升14.5%。

items.title: Indoor-Outdoor Energy Management for Wearable IoT Devices With Conformal Prediction and Rollout.
items.abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) devices have the potential to enable a wide range of applications, including smart health and agriculture. However, they are limited by their small battery capacities. Utilizing energy harvesting is a promising approach to augment the battery life of IoT devices. However, relying solely on harvested energy is insufficient due to the stochastic nature of ambient sources. Predicting and accounting for uncertainty in the energy harvest (EH) is critical for optimal energy management (EM) in wearable IoT devices. This article proposes a two-step uncertainty-aware EH prediction and management framework for wearable IoT devices. First, the framework employs an energy-efficient conformal prediction (CP) method to predict future EH and construct prediction intervals. Contrasting to prior CP approaches, we propose constructing the prediction intervals using a combination of residuals from previous hours and days. Second, the framework proposes a near-optimal EM approach that utilizes a rollout algorithm. The rollout algorithm efficiently simulates various energy allocation trajectories as a function of predicted EH bounds. Using results from the rollout, the proposed approach constructs energy allocation bounds that maximize application utility (quality of service) with a high probability. Evaluations using real-world energy data from ARAS and Mannheim datasets show that the proposed CP for EH prediction provides 93% coverage probability with an average width of 9.5 J and 1.9 J, respectively. Moreover, EM using the rollout algorithm provides energy allocation decisions that are within 1.9–2.9 J of the optimal with minimal overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 设备具有实现广泛应用的潜力，包括智能健康和农业。然而，它们受到电池容量较小的限制。利用能量收集是延长物联网设备电池寿命的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于环境来源的随机性，仅仅依靠收集的能量是不够的。预测和解释能量收集 (EH) 的不确定性对于可穿戴物联网设备中的最佳能量管理 (EM) 至关重要。本文提出了一种适用于可穿戴物联网设备的两步不确定性感知 EH 预测和管理框架。首先，该框架采用节能的共形预测（CP）方法来预测未来的 EH 并构建预测区间。与之前的 CP 方法相比，我们建议使用前几小时和前几天的残差组合来构建预测区间。其次，该框架提出了一种利用推出算法的近乎最优的 EM 方法。 rollout 算法有效地模拟各种能量分配轨迹作为预测 EH 边界的函数。使用推出的结果，所提出的方法构建了能量分配界限，以高概率最大化应用程序效用（服务质量）。使用来自 ARAS 和曼海姆数据集的真实世界能源数据进行的评估表明，所提出的 EH 预测 CP 提供了 93% 的覆盖概率，平均宽度分别为 9.5 J 和 1.9 J。此外，使用 rollout 算法的 EM 可以以最小的开销提供与最优值相差 1.9-2.9 J 的能量分配决策。

items.title: U-SWIM: Universal Selective Write-Verify for Computing-in-Memory Neural Accelerators.
items.abstract: Architectures that incorporate computing-in-memory (CiM) using emerging nonvolatile memory (NVM) devices have become strong contenders for deep neural network (DNN) acceleration due to their impressive energy efficiency. Yet, a significant challenge arises when using these emerging devices: they can show substantial variations during the weight-mapping process. This can severely impact DNN accuracy if not mitigated. A widely accepted remedy for imperfect weight mapping is the iterative write-verify approach, which involves verifying conductance values and adjusting devices if needed. In all existing publications, this procedure is applied to every individual device, resulting in a significant programming time overhead. In our research, we illustrate that only a small fraction of weights need this write-verify treatment for the corresponding devices and the DNN accuracy can be preserved, yielding a notable programming acceleration. Building on this, we introduce U-SWIM, a novel method based on the second derivative. It leverages a single iteration of forward and backpropagation to pinpoint the weights demanding write-verify. Through extensive tests on diverse DNN designs and datasets, U-SWIM manifests up to a 10× programming acceleration against the traditional exhaustive write-verify method, all while maintaining a similar accuracy level. Furthermore, compared to our earlier SWIM technique, U-SWIM excels, showing a 7× speedup when dealing with devices exhibiting nonuniform variations.
items.abstract_zh: 使用新兴非易失性存储器 (NVM) 设备整合内存计算 (CiM) 的架构因其令人印象深刻的能源效率而成为深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速的有力竞争者。然而，使用这些新兴设备时出现了一个重大挑战：它们在权重映射过程中可能会显示出巨大的变化。如果不缓解，这可能会严重影响 DNN 的准确性。对于不完美的权重映射，一种广泛接受的补救措施是迭代写入验证方法，其中包括验证电导值并在需要时调整设备。在所有现有出版物中，此过程应用于每个单独的设备，从而导致大量的编程时间开销。在我们的研究中，我们说明只有一小部分权重需要对相应设备进行这种写入验证处理，并且可以保留 DNN 准确性，从而产生显着的编程加速。在此基础上，我们引入了 U-SWIM，一种基于二阶导数的新颖方法。它利用前向和反向传播的单次迭代来确定需要写入验证的权重。通过对不同 DNN 设计和数据集的广泛测试，U-SWIM 表现出与传统方法相比高达 10× 编程加速详尽的写入验证方法，同时保持相似的准确性水平。此外，与我们早期的 SWIM 技术相比，U-SWIM 表现出色，在处理设备时显示出 7× 加速表现出不均匀的变化。

items.title: Compute-in-Memory-Based Neural Network Accelerators for Safety-Critical Systems: Worst-Case Scenarios and Protections.
items.abstract: Emerging nonvolatile memory (NVM)-based computing-in-memory (CiM) architectures show substantial promise in accelerating deep neural networks (DNNs) due to their exceptional energy efficiency. However, NVM devices are prone to device variations. Consequently, the actual DNN weights mapped to NVM devices can differ considerably from their targeted values, inducing significant performance degradation. Many existing solutions aim to optimize average performance amidst device variations, which is a suitable strategy for general-purpose conditions. However, the worst-case performance that is crucial for safety-critical applications is largely overlooked in current research. In this study, we define the problem of pinpointing the worst-case performance of CiM DNN accelerators affected by device variations. Additionally, we introduce a strategy to identify a specific pattern of the device value deviations in the complex, high-dimensional value deviation space, responsible for this worst-case outcome. Our findings reveal that even subtle device variations can precipitate a dramatic decline in DNN accuracy, posing risks for CiM-based platforms in supporting safety-critical applications. Notably, we observe that prevailing techniques to bolster average DNN performance in CiM accelerators fall short in enhancing worst-case scenarios. In light of this issue, we propose a novel worst-case-aware training technique named A-TRICE that efficiently combines adversarial training and noise-injection training with right-censored Gaussian noise to improve the DNN accuracy in the worst-case scenarios. Our experimental results demonstrate that A-TRICE improves the worst-case accuracy under device variations by up to 33%.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的基于非易失性存储器 (NVM) 的内存计算 (CiM) 架构由于其卓越的能源效率，在加速深度神经网络 (DNN) 方面显示出巨大的前景。然而，NVM 设备很容易出现设备变化。因此，映射到 NVM 设备的实际 DNN 权重可能与其目标值有很大差异，从而导致性能显着下降。许多现有的解决方案旨在优化设备变化中的平均性能，这是适合通用条件的策略。然而，当前的研究很大程度上忽视了对安全关键型应用至关重要的最坏情况性能。在本研究中，我们定义了精确定位受设备变化影响的 CiM DNN 加速器最坏情况性能的问题。此外，我们引入了一种策略来识别复杂的高维价值偏差空间中设备价值偏差的特定模式，该模式是造成这种最坏情况结果的原因。我们的研究结果表明，即使是细微的设备变化也会导致 DNN 准确性急剧下降，从而给基于 CiM 的平台在支持安全关键型应用方面带来风险。值得注意的是，我们观察到，提高 CiM 加速器中 DNN 平均性能的主流技术在增强最坏情况场景方面存在不足。鉴于这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 A-TRICE 的新颖的最坏情况感知训练技术，该技术将对抗性训练和噪声注入训练与右删失高斯噪声有效地结合起来，以提高最坏情况下 DNN 的准确性。我们的实验结果表明，A-TRICE 在器件变化的情况下将最坏情况下的精度提高了 33%。

items.title: MURLAV: A Multiple-Node-Upset Recovery Latch and Algorithm-Based Verification Method.
items.abstract: In advanced CMOS technologies, integrated circuits are sensitive to multiple-node-upsets (MNUs) induced in harsh radiation environments. The existing verification of the reliability of latches highly relies on electronic design automation (EDA) tools considering complex error-injection scenarios. In this article, we propose a novel latch, namely, MURLAV, protected against quadruple node-upsets (QNUs) induced in harsh radiation environments, as well as an algorithmic error-recovery verification method. The latch provides complete recovery from all QNUs with a formed redundant structure. The algorithm can simplify the verification process and demonstrate the QNU recovery for the proposed MURLAV latch. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed latch can recover from any QNU and that it has lower area and delay overhead. Compared with existing latches of the same type, the proposed MURLAV latch achieves an overhead reduction of 34% in silicon area and 15% in delay on average at the cost of moderate power consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 在先进的 CMOS 技术中，集成电路对恶劣辐射环境中引起的多节点扰乱 (MNU) 非常敏感。现有的锁存器可靠性验证高度依赖于考虑复杂错误注入场景的电子设计自动化 (EDA) 工具。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的锁存器，即 MURLAV，可防止恶劣辐射环境中引起的四重节点扰动 (QNU)，以及算法错误恢复验证方法。锁存器通过形成的冗余结构提供对所有 QNU 的完全恢复。该算法可以简化验证过程并演示所提出的 MURLAV 锁存器的 QNU 恢复。仿真结果表明，所提出的锁存器可以从任何 QNU 中恢复，并且具有较低的面积和延迟开销。与现有的同类型锁存器相比，所提出的MURLAV锁存器以适度的功耗为代价，实现了硅面积开销平均减少34%，延迟平均减少15%。

items.title: Strider: Signal Value Transition-Guided Defect Repair for HDL Programming Assignments.
items.abstract: Hardware description languages (HDLs) are pivotal for the development of hardware designs. The programming courses for HDLs are also popular in both universities and online course platforms. Similar to programming assignments of software languages (SLs), these of HDLs also actively call for automated program repair (APR) techniques to provide personalized feedback for students. However, the research of APR techniques targeting HDL programming assignments is still in an early stage. Due to the significantly different programming mechanism of HDLs from SLs, the only APR technique (i.e., CirFix) targeting HDL programming assignments contributes a customized repair pipeline. However, the fundamental challenges in the design of HDL-oriented fault localization and patch generation still remain unresolved. In this work, we propose a signal value transition-guided defect repair technique named Strider by capturing the intrinsic features of HDLs. This technique consists of a time-aware dynamic defect localization approach to precisely localize defects, and a signal value transition-guided patch synthesis approach to effectively generate fixes. We further construct a dataset of 57 real defects from HDL programming assignments for tool evaluation. The evaluation reveals the overfitting issue of the pioneering tool CirFix and the significant improvement of Strider over CirFix in terms of both effectiveness and efficiency. In particular, Strider is more effective by correctly fixing 2.3× as many defects as CirFix in the real defect dataset, and is 23× more efficient by generating a correct fix within 5 min on average in the synthetic defect dataset, while CirFix takes around 2 h on average.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件描述语言 (HDL) 对于硬件设计的开发至关重要。 HDL 编程课程在大学和在线课程平台上也很受欢迎。与软件语言（SL）的编程作业类似，HDL 的编程作业也积极呼吁自动程序修复（APR）技术来为学生提供个性化反馈。然而，针对 HDL 编程作业的 APR 技术的研究仍处于早期阶段。由于 HDL 与 SL 的编程机制显着不同，唯一针对 HDL 编程任务的 APR 技术（即 CirFix）提供了定制的修复管道。然而，面向 HDL 的故障定位和补丁生成设计的根本挑战仍未解决。在这项工作中，我们通过捕获 HDL 的内在特征，提出了一种名为 Strider 的信号值转换引导的缺陷修复技术。该技术包括用于精确定位缺陷的时间感知动态缺陷定位方法和用于有效生成修复的信号值转换引导补丁合成方法。我们进一步构建了一个由 HDL 编程作业中的 57 个真实缺陷组成的数据集，用于工具评估。评估揭示了先驱工具 CirFix 的过拟合问题，以及 Strider 相对于 CirFix 在有效性和效率方面的显着改进。特别是，Strider 通过正确修复与真实缺陷数据集中的 CirFix 一样多的缺陷，更加有效，通过在合成缺陷数据集中平均 5 分钟内生成正确的修复， 23× 效率更高，而 CirFix 则需要平均2小时左右。

items.title: Toward Write Optimization for Skyrmion Racetrack Memory by Skyrmion Repermutation.
items.abstract: Skyrmion racetrack memory (Sky-RM), as an emerging nonvolatile memory technology, provides both high-density data storage and low-access latency, accompanying with a novel feature of using current to shift data along a racetrack. However, it is time-comsuing and energy-hungry to write/inject new particle-like Skyrimons on Sky-RM compared with other manipulations. Thus, the goal of this work is to presents a novel strategy to optimize write performance in Sky-RM, permutation-write (PW). Particularly, PW reduces the number of Skyrmion injections when writing data, by “repermuting” existing Skyrmion particles within a racetrack. Moreover, based on the flexible concept of repermutation, this work further proposes PW+ strategy, which is an optimized PW strategy integrated with injection and shift optimizations to achieve better performance. Our evaluation results justify that PW+ can greatly reduce the amount of Skyrmion injections, which are considered highly expensive in Sky-RM, by at least 50%, compared with other state-of-the-art write-optimized strategies. Furthermore, PW+ only incurs 1.79 injections, averaged for every 64-bit-word write. We show that PW+ strategy can bring significant benefits over other state-of-the-art write-optimized strategies by about 16%–50% for every 64-bit-word write, for both performance and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: Skyrmion赛道存储器（Sky-RM）作为一种新兴的非易失性存储器技术，提供高密度数据存储和低访问延迟，并具有利用电流沿赛道移动数据的新颖功能。然而，与其他操作相比，在 Sky-RM 上写入/注入新的类粒子 Skyrimons 既耗时又耗能。因此，这项工作的目标是提出一种新颖的策略来优化 Sky-RM 中的写入性能，即排列写入 (PW)。特别是，PW 通过“重新排列”赛道内现有的 Skyrmion 粒子，减少了写入数据时的 Skyrmion 注入数量。此外，基于灵活的重排列概念，本文进一步提出了PW+策略，这是一种结合注入和移位优化以实现更好性能的优化PW策略。我们的评估结果证明，与其他最先进的写入优化策略相比，PW+ 可以大大减少 Skyrmion 注入量至少 50%，而 Skyrmion 注入量在 Sky-RM 中被认为非常昂贵。此外，PW+ 仅发生 1.79 次注入，平均每 64 位字写入一次。我们表明，与其他最先进的写入优化策略相比，PW+ 策略在性能和能源效率方面，每 64 位字写入可带来约 16%–50% 的显着优势。

items.title: AEM-PCB Reverser: Circuit Schematic Generation in PCB Reverse Engineering Using Reinforcement Learning Based on Aesthetic Evaluation Metric.
items.abstract: PCB reverse engineering plays a crucial role in verifying circuit design, detecting hardware Trojans, and maintaining outdated devices. The reverse generation of printed circuit board (PCB) schematics, a vital aspect of this engineering, heavily relies on manual design due to the challenge of objectively evaluating schematic quality. This article introduces a novel acrlong AEM to assess the quality of PCB schematics. Based on this metric, a PCB schematic reverse generation method using reinforcement learning is proposed. Experimental results demonstrate the metric and method’s reliability and effectiveness, as they can automatically generate PCB schematics comparable to those designed by human engineers.
items.abstract_zh: PCB逆向工程在验证电路设计、检测硬件木马、维护过时设备等方面发挥着至关重要的作用。印刷电路板 (PCB) 原理图的反向生成是该工程的一个重要方面，由于客观评估原理图质量的挑战，它在很大程度上依赖于手动设计。本文介绍了一种新颖的 acrlong AEM 来评估 PCB 原理图的质量。基于该指标，提出了一种利用强化学习的PCB原理图反向生成方法。实验结果证明了该指标和方法的可靠性和有效性，因为它们可以自动生成与人类工程师设计的 PCB 原理图相当的 PCB 原理图。

items.title: RecPIM: Efficient In-Memory Processing for Personalized Recommendation Inference Using Near-Bank Architecture.
items.abstract: Deep learning (DL)-based personalized recommendation systems consume the major resources in modern AI data centers. The embedding layers with large memory capacity requirement and high bandwidth demand have been identified as the bottleneck of personalized recommendation inference. To mitigate the memory bandwidth bottleneck, near-memory processing (NMP) would be an effective solution which utilizes the through-silicon via (TSV) bandwidth within 3D-stacked DRAMs. However, existing NMP architectures suffer from the limited memory bandwidth caused by hard-to-scale TSVs. To overcome this obstacle, integrating the compute-logic near memory banks becomes a promising but challenging solution, since large memory capacity requirement limits the use of 3D-stacked DRAMs and irregular memory accesses lead to poor data locality, heavy TSV data traffic and low bank-level bandwidth utilization. To address this problem, we propose RecPIM, the first in-memory processing system for personalized recommendation inference using near-bank architecture based on 3D-stacked memory. From the hardware perspective, we introduce a heterogeneous memory system combined with 3D-stacked DRAM and DIMMs to accommodate large embedding tables and provide high bandwidth. By integrating processing logic units near memory banks on DRAM dies, our architecture can exploit the enormous bank-level bandwidth which is much higher than TSV bandwidth. Then, we integrate a small scratchpad memory to exploit the unique data reusability of DL-based personalized recommendation systems. Furthermore, we adopt a unidirectional data communication scheme to avoid additional cross-vault data transfer. From the software perspective, we present a customized programming model to facilitate memory management and task offloading. To reduce the data communication through TSVs and enhance the utilization of bank-level bandwidth, we develop an efficient data mapping scheme by partitioning the vector into smaller subvectors. Experimental results show that RecPIM achieves up to 2.58× speedup and 49.8% energy saving for data movement over the state-of-the-art NMP solution.
items.abstract_zh: 基于深度学习（DL）的个性化推荐系统消耗了现代人工智能数据中心的主要资源。具有大内存容量需求和高带宽需求的嵌入层已被确定为个性化推荐推理的瓶颈。为了缓解内存带宽瓶颈，近内存处理 (NMP) 将是一种有效的解决方案，它利用 3D 堆叠 DRAM 内的硅通孔 (TSV) 带宽。然而，现有的 NMP 架构因难以扩展 TSV 而导致内存带宽有限。为了克服这一障碍，在存储体附近集成计算逻辑成为一种有前途但具有挑战性的解决方案，因为大内存容量要求限制了 3D 堆栈 DRAM 的使用，并且不规则的内存访问导致数据局部性差、TSV 数据流量大和存储体级带宽利用率低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 RecPIM，这是第一个使用基于 3D 堆栈内存的近库架构进行个性化推荐推理的内存处理系统。从硬件角度来看，我们引入了与 3D 堆叠 DRAM 和 DIMM 相结合的异构内存系统，以容纳大型嵌入表并提供高带宽。通过在 DRAM 芯片上的存储体附近集成处理逻辑单元，我们的架构可以利用远高于 TSV 带宽的巨大存储体级带宽。然后，我们集成了一个小型暂存器，以利用基于深度学习的个性化推荐系统独特的数据可重用性。此外，我们采用单向数据通信方案来避免额外的跨库数据传输。从软件的角度来看，我们提出了一个定制的编程模型来促进内存管理和任务卸载。为了减少通过 TSV 的数据通信并提高存储体级带宽的利用率，我们通过将向量划分为更小的子向量来开发有效的数据映射方案。实验结果表明，RecPIM 实现了高达 2.58× 加速和 49.8% 的节能通过最先进的 NMP 解决方案进行数据移动。

items.title: Flexible and Efficient Convolutional Acceleration on Unified Hardware Using the Two-Stage Splitting Method and Layer-Adaptive Allocation of 1-D/2-D Winograd Units.
items.abstract: General convolution acceleration, such as Winograd and FFT, is a promising direction to address the computational complexity of current convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, the flexibility of these CNNs makes this kind of scheme always introduce massive redundant computations, damaging the acceleration effect. In this article, a two-stage splitting method for arbitrarily sized tensors and filters and a unified hardware architecture using layer-adaptive allocated Winograd units are proposed, achieving effective redundance elimination and unified architecture. First, a tensor adaptive presplitting method is proposed to divide the original tensors to match the rule of Winograd. Furthermore, a Winograd-based extended splitting scheme is designed to reduce the redundant calculations; therefore, a substantial reduction in multiplication operations in convolutional layers achieved 30.6%–75% savings. Finally, a unified hardware architecture with a layer-adaptive allocation method is proposed to evaluate and select the optimal Winograd F( m , r ) units and input/output parallelisms. This architecture is evaluated based on the Xilinx XCVU9P platform and achieves 1.97/1.23/1.60/1.25 GOPS/DSP for AlexNet, VGG16, modified VGG16, and ResNet18, respectively. It achieves up to 5.81× improvements in DSP efficiency compared with previous FPGA-based designs.
items.abstract_zh: 通用卷积加速，例如 Winograd 和 FFT，是解决当前卷积神经网络 (CNN) 计算复杂性的一个有前途的方向。然而，这些CNN的灵活性使得此类方案总是引入大量冗余计算，损害了加速效果。本文提出了一种任意大小张量和滤波器的两级分割方法以及使用分层自适应分配的 Winograd 单元的统一硬件架构，实现了有效的冗余消除和统一架构。首先，提出一种张量自适应预分割方法来划分原始张量以匹配Winograd规则。此外，还设计了基于Winograd的扩展分割方案，以减少冗余计算；因此，卷积层中乘法运算的大幅减少实现了 30.6%–75% 的节省。最后，提出了一种具有层自适应分配方法的统一硬件架构来评估和选择最佳的 Winograd F( m 、 r ）单位和输入/输出并行度。该架构基于 Xilinx XCVU9P 平台进行评估，AlexNet、VGG16、修改版 VGG16 和 ResNet18 分别达到 1.97/1.23/1.60/1.25 GOPS/DSP。与之前基于 FPGA 的设计相比，它的 DSP 效率提高了 5.81× 。

items.title: Efficient Quantum Circuit Synthesis for SAT-Oracle With Limited Ancillary Qubit.
items.abstract: One of the main concerns in the era of noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) computing and fault-tolerant quantum computing is the optimization of circuit implementation for quantum oracles, particularly with limited resources. Synthesizing a satisfiability (SAT) oracle, a crucial component in solving SAT problems, presents a significant challenge. The current state-of-the-art implementation of an m -clause SAT-oracle necessitates 2m-1 ancillary qubits and a linear number of elementary gates. We develop two efficient and ancilla-adjustable synthesis algorithms to reduce the overall quantum resource usage. Our first quantum oracle algorithm achieves quadratic optimization in the number of ancillary qubits with merely eight times increased circuit size. We also show that using only three ancillary qubits with quadratic circuit size expansion is enough. Our second algorithm optimizes the circuit depth of the SAT oracle to \tilde O(\log m) using m ancillary qubits. By running our algorithms on classical intractable SAT instances featured in SAT competitions, the experiment results show that our required quantum resources align well with our theoretical analysis. Our algorithms highlight the scalability of SAT-oracle-based algorithms in near-term quantum devices, such as Grover’s algorithm.
items.abstract_zh: 噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）计算和容错量子计算时代的主要问题之一是量子预言机电路实现的优化，特别是在资源有限的情况下。综合可满足性 (SAT) 预言机是解决 SAT 问题的关键组成部分，这是一项重大挑战。当前最先进的 m -clause SAT-oracle 实现需要 2m-1 辅助量子位和线性数量的基本门。我们开发了两种高效且辅助可调的合成算法，以减少总体量子资源的使用。我们的第一个量子预言算法仅在电路尺寸增加八倍的情况下实现了辅助量子位数量的二次优化。我们还表明，仅使用三个具有二次电路尺寸扩展的辅助量子位就足够了。我们的第二个算法将 SAT 预言机的电路深度优化为 \tilde O(\log m) 使用 m 辅助量子位。通过在 SAT 竞赛中经典的棘手 SAT 实例上运行我们的算法，实验结果表明我们所需的量子资源与我们的理论分析非常吻合。我们的算法强调了基于 SAT 预言机的算法在近期量子设备中的可扩展性，例如 Grover 的算法。

items.title: Optimizing AES Threshold Implementation Under the Glitch-Extended Probing Model.
items.abstract: Threshold implementation (TI) is a well-known Boolean masking technique that provides provable security against side-channel attacks. In the presence of glitches, the probing model was replaced by the so-called glitch-extended probing model which specifies a broader security framework. In CHES 2021, Shahmirzadi et al. introduced a general search method for finding first-order 2-share TI schemes without fresh randomness (under the presence of glitches) for a given encryption algorithm. Although it handles well single-output Boolean functions, this method has to store output shares in registers when extended to vector Boolean functions, which results in more chip area and increased latency. Therefore, the design of TI schemes that have low-implementation cost under the glitch-extended probing model appears to be an important research challenge. In this article, we propose an approach to design the first-order glitch-extended probing secure TI schemes when quadratic functions are employed in the substitution layer. This method only requires a small amount of fresh random bits and a single clock cycle for its implementation. In particular, the random bits in our approach are reusable and compatible with the changing of the guards technique. Our dedicated TI scheme for the AES cipher gives 20.23% smaller implementation area and 4.2% faster encryption compared to the TI scheme of AES (without using fresh randomness) proposed in CHES 2021. Additionally, we propose a parallel implementation of two S-boxes that further reduces latency (about 39.83\% ) at the expense of increasing the chip area by 9%. We have positively confirmed the security of AES under the glitch-extended probing model using the verification tool—SILVER and the side-channel leakage assessment method—TVLA.
items.abstract_zh: 阈值实现 (TI) 是一种众所周知的布尔掩码技术，可提供针对旁路攻击的可证明的安全性。在存在故障的情况下，探测模型被所谓的故障扩展探测模型所取代，该模型指定了更广泛的安全框架。在 CHES 2021 中，Shahmirzadi 等人。介绍了一种通用搜索方法，用于查找给定加密算法的一阶 2 共享 TI 方案，而无需新的随机性（存在故障的情况下）。虽然它可以很好地处理单输出布尔函数，但当扩展到矢量布尔函数时，该方法必须将输出份额存储在寄存器中，这会导致更多的芯片面积和增加的延迟。因此，在毛刺扩展探测模型下设计低实现成本的TI方案似乎是一个重要的研究挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种在替换层中采用二次函数时设计一阶毛刺扩展探测安全 TI 方案的方法。该方法的实现只需要少量的新鲜随机位和单个时钟周期。特别是，我们的方法中的随机位是可重用的并且与保护技术的改变兼容。与 CHES 2021 中提出的 AES TI 方案（不使用新随机性）相比，我们针对 AES 密码的专用 TI 方案实现面积缩小了 20.23%，加密速度提高了 4.2%。此外，我们提出了两个 S-box 的并行实现，进一步减少了延迟（大约 39.83\% ），代价是芯片面积增加了 9%。我们使用验证工具SILVER和侧信道泄漏评估方法TVLA在毛刺扩展探测模型下肯定了AES的安全性。

items.title: Timing-Driven Technology Mapping Approximation Based on Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: As the transistor technology nodes shrink into the nano-scales, timing guardbands caused by aging effects and process variations continue to increase. Approximate computing can eliminate aging-and-variation-induced timing guardbands without sacrificing the design performance. It can apply local approximate changes (LACs) automatically in circuits to reduce critical path delay (CPD). However, efficiently achieving timing optimization under error distance constraints is still tricky. This work proposes an automated timing-driven technology mapping approximation framework based on reinforcement learning (RL). The framework uses path-weighted graph neural networks (PGNNs) to embed RL states and timing path-aware LAC candidates to construct RL action spaces. It can efficiently eliminate timing guardbands induced by aging and variation. Our proposed circuit-agnostic framework operates on the gate-level netlists. According to experiments on the open-source circuits using TSMC 28 and 16-nm technology under aging and variation conditions, our framework can achieve an average 24.78% CPD reduction under five different error distance constraints and 4.83× speedup, compared with a state-of-the-art method.
items.abstract_zh: 随着晶体管技术节点缩小到纳米级，由老化效应和工艺变化引起的时序保护带不断增加。近似计算可以消除老化和变化引起的时序保护带，而不会牺牲设计性能。它可以在电路中自动应用局部近似变化（LAC）以减少关键路径延迟（CPD）。然而，在误差距离约束下有效实现时序优化仍然很棘手。这项工作提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的自动化时序驱动技术映射近似框架。该框架使用路径加权图神经网络 (PGNN) 嵌入 RL 状态并计时路径感知的 LAC 候选者来构建 RL 动作空间。它可以有效地消除由老化和变化引起的时序保护带。我们提出的电路无关框架在门级网表上运行。根据使用 TSMC 28 和 16 nm 技术的开源电路在老化和变化条件下的实验，我们的框架在五种不同的误差距离约束下可以实现平均 24.78% 的 CPD 降低 $4.83× $ 加速。

items.title: Fast Aging-Aware Timing Analysis Framework With Temporal-Spatial Graph Neural Network.
items.abstract: With the downscaling of CMOS technology, device aging induced by hot carrier injection and bias temperature instability effects poses severe challenges to timing analysis of digital circuits. In this work, a fast aging-aware timing analysis framework based on temporal–spatial graph neural network (GNN) is proposed for the first time. The temporal–spatial GNN takes gated tanh unit (GTU) as the temporal network to extract devices’ degradation from dynamic biases, and takes inductive GraphSAGE as the spatial network to obtain whole graph information from circuit topology and output circuit aging delay. With comprehensive comparison among the network candidates, the combination of GTU and GraphSAGE presents the highest accuracy in predicting the standard cell aging delay. Owing to the superior features capture capability, this framework significantly improves the aging prediction efficiency under various operation conditions, especially facing the iterations of usage scenario, design version and process design kit. Compared with the conventional flow, the average acceleration ratio of our temporal–spatial network in predicting aging delay is more than 200 times. Furthermore, this framework is demonstrated with ADDER and FIFO circuits in timing analysis at the end of life. Thus, this work is helpful to the aging-aware circuit design in nano-scale technology.
items.abstract_zh: 随着CMOS技术的尺寸缩小，热载流子注入和偏置温度不稳定效应引起的器件老化给数字电路的时序分析带来了严峻的挑战。在这项工作中，首次提出了一种基于时空图神经网络（GNN）的快速老化感知时序分析框架。时空GNN以门控双曲正切单元（GTU）作为时间网络，从动态偏差中提取设备的退化情况，并以归纳GraphSAGE作为空间网络，从电路拓扑和输出电路老化延迟中获取全图信息。通过对候选网络的综合比较，GTU和GraphSAGE的组合在预测标准小区老化延迟方面呈现出最高的准确性。由于卓越的特征捕获能力，该框架显着提高了各种操作条件下的老化预测效率，特别是面对使用场景、设计版本和流程设计套件的迭代。与传统流程相比，我们的时空网络在预测老化延迟方面的平均加速比超过200倍。此外，该框架还通过 ADDER 和 FIFO 电路在寿命结束时的时序分析中进行了演示。因此，这项工作有助于纳米级技术中的老化感知电路设计。

items.title: INEAD: Intermediate Node Evaluation-Based Attack Detection for Secure Approximate Computing Systems.
items.abstract: Approximate computing techniques that trade accuracy for better computing performance and energy efficiency have been widely used in many computation-intensive applications. As reported in the recent literature, approximate computing systems are prone to stealthy attacks that exploit approximation mechanisms to disguise malicious behaviors in normal operations. The analysis performed in this work indicates that the primary outputs of applications with approximate components are not the best location to detect the presence of attacks. This work proposes an intermediate node evaluation-based attack detection (INEAD) method to distinguish whether the cause of inaccuracy in applications is due to approximation or attacks. The attack detection rate of the proposed method was examined in two applications: 1) an approximate fast Fourier transform (FFT) and 2) an artificial neural network (ANN) using approximate arithmetic modules. The case study of an approximate FFT shows that the INEAD method improves the attack detection rate by 61.6% and reduces the false positive rate by up to 91% over the existing work that detects attacks at the primary output stage. The case study of an approximate ANN shows that the INEAD method outperforms the baseline by 93.6% in terms of attack detection rate.
items.abstract_zh: 以精度换取更好的计算性能和能源效率的近似计算技术已广泛应用于许多计算密集型应用中。正如最近的文献报道的那样，近似计算系统很容易受到隐秘攻击，这些攻击利用近似机制来掩盖正常操作中的恶意行为。这项工作中进行的分析表明，具有近似组件的应用程序的主要输出并不是检测攻击存在的最佳位置。这项工作提出了一种基于中间节点评估的攻击检测（INEAD）方法来区分应用程序中不准确的原因是由于近似还是攻击。所提出方法的攻击检测率在两个应用中进行了检查：1）近似快速傅里叶变换（FFT）和2）使用近似算术模块的人工神经网络（ANN）。近似FFT的案例研究表明，与现有在主输出阶段检测攻击的工作相比，INEAD方法将攻击检测率提高了61.6%，误报率降低了高达91%。近似 ANN 的案例研究表明，INEAD 方法在攻击检测率方面优于基线 93.6%。

items.title: 9-Input Threshold Function Identification Using a New Necessary Condition of Threshold Function.
items.abstract: Identification of a threshold function (TF) is a significant task that determines whether a given Boolean function is a TF or not. The state-of-the-art only identifies all 8-input NP-class TFs. In this article, we propose a new necessary condition for a function being a representative NP-class TF. With the proposed necessary condition, we design an effective approach to identify 9-input NP-class TFs. As a result, we reduce the candidate set of 9-input functions being TFs to an extremely tiny subset of all 9-input Boolean functions. Experimental results show that our approach successfully identifies at least 80% of 9-input NP-class TFs. This is the first attempt to deal with this challenging problem in the literature.
items.abstract_zh: 阈值函数（TF）的识别是一项重要的任务，它确定给定的布尔函数是否是 TF。最先进的技术只能识别所有 8 输入 NP 类 TF。在本文中，我们提出了一个函数成为代表性 NP 类 TF 的新必要条件。根据所提出的必要条件，我们设计了一种有效的方法来识别 9 输入 NP 类 TF。因此，我们将作为 TF 的 9 输入函数的候选集减少到所有 9 输入布尔函数的极小子集。实验结果表明，我们的方法成功识别了至少 80% 的 9 输入 NP 类 TF。这是文献中首次尝试解决这一具有挑战性的问题。

items.title: CPU Address-Leakage Transient Execution Attack Detection and Its Countermeasures.
items.abstract: Modern advanced CPU designs are frequently exposed to transient execution vulnerabilities, which allow attackers to harness microarchitectural side effects for data exfiltration. The leaked data may encompass direct target data, such as RSA keys or indirect information, like physical page mappings. Thus, transient execution attacks can be divided into data-leakage and address-leakage, depending on the specific targets that are exposed. Existing studies have developed practical defenses and detection mechanisms against the microarchitectural attacks. However, almost all of them focus solely on data leakage and are thus unable to detect and counter address-leakage attacks, like Spoiler, due to their unique mechanisms. This article introduces AAlert, the first detection mechanism specifically designed for address-leakage transient execution attacks. AALERT integrates a Cuckoo filter module within the CPU’s memory order buffer (MOB) to screen buffered addresses on the fly. We further optimize the filtering algorithm to minimize false positives. We discuss and implement several countermeasures to defeat the detected attacks. Finally, we evaluate the effectiveness and performance of AAlert based on prototype implementations, demonstrating a detection rate of 99.99% with negligible performance overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 现代先进的 CPU 设计经常暴露于瞬时执行漏洞，这使得攻击者能够利用微架构的副作用进行数据泄露。泄露的数据可能包含直接目标数据（例如 RSA 密钥）或间接信息（例如物理页映射）。因此，根据暴露的具体目标，瞬时执行攻击可以分为数据泄漏和地址泄漏。现有的研究已经开发出针对微架构攻击的实用防御和检测机制。然而，几乎所有这些攻击都只关注数据泄露，因此由于其独特的机制而无法检测和反击像 Spoiler 这样的地址泄露攻击。本文介绍了AAlert，这是第一个专门针对地址泄漏瞬时执行攻击而设计的检测机制。 AALERT 在 CPU 的内存顺序缓冲区 (MOB) 中集成了一个 Cuckoo 过滤器模块，以动态筛选缓冲地址。我们进一步优化过滤算法以最大限度地减少误报。我们讨论并实施了几种对策来击败检测到的攻击。最后，我们基于原型实现评估了 AAlert 的有效性和性能，证明检测率高达 99.99%，性能开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: DeltaGNN: Accelerating Graph Neural Networks on Dynamic Graphs With Delta Updating.
items.abstract: Graph neural network (GNN) accelerators have achieved prominent performance speedup on static graphs but fallen with inefficiency on dynamic graphs. The reason is that in dynamic graphs, updating on a few vertices will introduce enormous redundant neighbor reaggregation and feature reupdating. Moreover, evolving graph structure makes graph preprocessing impractical and incurs random memory accesses which can only be determined at runtime. In this article, we propose DeltaGNN, an algorithm and accelerator co-design for GNN acceleration on dynamic graphs. In algorithm, we first propose a delta updating algorithm, which identifies the sensitivity of vertices and reduces the aggregation and updating operations of insensitive vertices without accuracy compromise. In hardware, we propose a novel sensitivity remapping cache to satisfy the dissimilar reusability of vertices under different sensitivity without preprocessing requirement. To tackle the workload imbalance, we implement feature-disperse execution to support different feature updating between sensitive and insensitive vertices. Moreover, we introduce vertex feature coalescing to reduce the amount of feature vectors by exploiting the locality within vertex accesses. We then propose lightweight yet effective hardware optimizations to make our design applicable to conventional GNN accelerators. Compared to the state-of-the-art GNN accelerators, our DeltaGNN gains an average of 1.5× – 11.8× speedup and 1.3× – 8.6× energy efficiency improvement on dynamic graphs.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）加速器在静态图上实现了显着的性能加速，但在动态图上效率低下。原因是在动态图中，对几个顶点的更新将引入巨大的冗余邻居重新聚合和特征重新更新。此外，不断发展的图结构使得图预处理变得不切实际，并且会产生只能在运行时确定的随机内存访问。在本文中，我们提出了 DeltaGNN，一种用于动态图上 GNN 加速的算法和加速器协同设计。在算法上，我们首先提出了增量更新算法，该算法识别顶点的敏感性，并在不影响精度的情况下减少不敏感顶点的聚合和更新操作。在硬件方面，我们提出了一种新颖的灵敏度重映射缓存，以满足不同灵敏度下顶点的不同可重用性，而无需预处理。为了解决工作负载不平衡的问题，我们实现了特征分散执行，以支持敏感和不敏感顶点之间的不同特征更新。此外，我们引入顶点特征合并，通过利用顶点访问中的局部性来减少特征向量的数量。然后，我们提出轻量级但有效的硬件优化，使我们的设计适用于传统的 GNN 加速器。与最先进的 GNN 加速器相比，我们的 DeltaGNN 平均获得 1.5× – 11.8× 加速和 1.3× – 8.6× 动态图上的能源效率改进。

items.title: Automatic Design for W-Band Front-End System via Bottom-Up Sizing and Layout Generation.
items.abstract: In recent years, electronic design automation methodologies based on hierarchical multilevel bottom-up (BU) design approaches are emerging and successfully applied for RF system design. In this article, we propose a design automation methodology for the synthesis of millimeter-wave (mm-wave) systems via BU approaches, including sizing and layout generation. First, uniformly sampled passive and active component libraries with prepared layouts and S-parameter files are constructed during the offline preparation stage. Second, the BU sizing from the device level to the system level has been demonstrated via multiobjective optimization algorithms, while an improved Euclidean mapping strategy is proposed to efficiently search over circuit-level Pareto-optimal fronts (POFs) in the system-level optimization. Third, the parameterized DRC/LVS clean layout can be hierarchically generated for the system-level POFs. Compared to flat optimization at the system level, the proposed method greatly reduces the size of the search space with the highest accuracy possible and can be used for the synthesis of complex mm-wave systems. The proposed method achieves a 10× runtime speedup in the system-level optimization with better optimization results.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，基于分层多级自下而上（BU）设计方法的电子设计自动化方法不断涌现，并成功应用于射频系统设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过 BU 方法合成毫米波 (mm-wave) 系统的设计自动化方法，包括尺寸调整和布局生成。首先，在离线准备阶段构建具有准备好的布局和S参数文件的统一采样的无源和有源元件库。其次，通过多目标优化算法论证了从器件级到系统级的BU尺寸，同时提出了改进的欧几里得映射策略，以在系统级优化中有效地搜索电路级帕累托最优前沿（POF）。第三，可以为系统级POF分层生成参数化的DRC/LVS干净布局。与系统级的平面优化相比，该方法以尽可能高的精度大大减小了搜索空间的大小，可用于复杂毫米波系统的综合。所提出的方法在系统级优化中实现了 10× 运行加速，并具有更好的优化结果。

items.title: Optimization of High-Efficiency GaN Load Modulated Balanced Amplifier for Integrated Sensing and Communication Applications.
items.abstract: The novelty of this article is proposing an optimization strategy to design a high-efficiency load modulated balanced amplifier (LMBA) for integrated sensing and communication applications. Taking account of the operating characteristics, theoretical analysis reveals that different load modulation factors of the LMBA need to be realized in Mode I for communication applications, and in Mode II for sensing applications, respectively. To address this issue, the proposed strategy is used to optimize the LMBA, so as to achieve good performance for both modes. To verify the proposed strategy, an LMBA prototype operating from 1.55 to 2.55 GHz is designed with the use of three commercial gallium nitride (GaN) transistors. When tested in Mode I, the LMBA achieves a 9-dB back-off efficiency of 50.1%–68.7% and a saturated efficiency of 65.0%–79.6%. When excited by a 60-MHz 5G new radio signal with a 9-dB peak-to-average power ratio, the adjacent channel power ratio of the LMBA in Mode I is from -45 to -52.2 dBc after digital predistortion with the average efficiency of 50.0%–66.9% over the entire bandwidth. When the LMBA is measured in Mode II, it achieves a saturated output power of 43.7–45.4 dBm and a saturated efficiency of 55.3%–72.2% from 1.55 to 2.55 GHz.
items.abstract_zh: 本文的新颖之处在于提出了一种优化策略，为集成传感和通信应用设计高效负载调制平衡放大器 (LMBA)。考虑到工作特性，理论分析表明，LMBA 的不同负载调制因子需要分别在通信应用的模式 I 和传感应用的模式 II 中实现。为了解决这个问题，所提出的策略被用来优化LMBA，从而使两种模式都获得良好的性能。为了验证所提出的策略，使用三个商用氮化镓 (GaN) 晶体管设计了一个工作频率为 1.55 至 2.55 GHz 的 LMBA 原型。在模式 I 下测试时，LMBA 的 9 dB 回退效率为 50.1%–68.7%，饱和效率为 65.0%–79.6%。当受到峰值平均功率比为9dB的60MHz 5G新无线电信号激励时，模式I下的LMBA在数字预失真后的邻道功率比为-45至-52.2dBc，整个带宽上的平均效率为50.0%~66.9%。当LMBA在模式II下测量时，它在1.55至2.55 GHz范围内实现了43.7-45.4 dBm的饱和输出功率和55.3%-72.2%的饱和效率。

items.title: Does Qubit Connectivity Impact Quantum Circuit Complexity?
items.abstract: Some physical implementation schemes of quantum computing can apply two-qubit gates only on certain pairs of qubits. These connectivity constraints are commonly viewed as a significant disadvantage. For example, compiling an unrestricted n -qubit quantum circuit to one with poor qubit connectivity, such as a 1-D chain, usually results in a blowup of depth by O(n^2) and size by O(n) . It is appealing to conjecture that this overhead is unavoidable—a random circuit on n qubits has \Theta (n) two-qubit gates in each layer and a constant fraction of them act on qubits separated by distance \Theta (n) . While it is known that almost all n -qubit unitary operations need quantum circuits of \Omega (4^n/n) depth and \Omega (4^n) size to realize with all-to-all qubit connectivity, in this article, we show that all n -qubit unitary operations can be implemented by quantum circuits of O(4^n/n) depth and O(4^n) size even under 1-D chain qubit connectivity constraint. We extend this result and investigate qubit connectivity in three directions. First, we consider more general connectivity graphs and show that the circuit size can always be made O(4^n) as long as the graph is connected. For circuit depth, we study d -dimensional grids, complete d -ary trees and expander graphs, and show results similar to the 1-D chain. Second, we consider the case when ancillary qubits are available. We show that, with ancilla, the circuit depth can be made polynomial, and the space-depth trade-off is not impaired by connectivity constraints unless we have exponentially many ancillary qubits. Third, we obtain nearly optimal results on special families of unitaries, including diagonal unitaries, 2-by-2 block diagonal unitaries, and quantum state preparation (QSP) unitaries, the last being a fundamental task used in many quantum algorithms for machine learning and linear algebra.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算的一些物理实现方案只能在某些量子位对上应用双量子位门。这些连接限制通常被视为一个重大缺点。例如，将不受限制的 n -qubit 量子电路编译为量子位连接性较差的电路，例如一维链，通常会导致深度放大 O(n^2) 和大小放大 O(n) 。令人猜测的是，这种开销是不可避免的 - n 量子位上的随机电路 \Theta (n) 每层有两个量子位门，其中恒定分数作用于按距离分隔的量子位 \Theta (n) 。虽然众所周知，几乎所有 n -qubit 酉运算都需要 \Omega (4^n/n) 深度和 \Omega (4^n) 尺寸来实现所有到所有的量子位连接，在本文中，我们展示了所有 n -qubit 酉运算可以通过 O(4^n/n) 深度和 O(4^n) 即使在一维链量子位连接约束下也是如此。我们扩展了这一结果，并从三个方向研究了量子位连接性。首先，我们考虑更一般的连接图，并表明只要满足图形已连接。对于电路深度，我们研究 d 维网格，完整的 d 元树和扩展图，并显示与一维链类似的结果。其次，我们考虑辅助量子位可用的情况。我们证明，通过辅助，电路深度可以变成多项式，并且空间深度权衡不会受到连接性限制的影响，除非我们有指数级数量的辅助量子位。第三，我们在特殊酉族上获得了近乎最佳的结果，包括对角酉、2×2块对角酉和量子态准备（QSP）酉，最后一个是机器学习和线性代数的许多量子算法中使用的基本任务。

items.title: Optimizing Secure Deletion in Interlaced Magnetic Recording With Move-on-Cover Approach.
items.abstract: Secure deletion plays a crucial role in safeguarding privacy and maintaining confidentiality. Historically, secure deletion was achieved on magnetic storage devices by data overwriting. However, with the rapid advancements in magnetic storage technology, existing secure deletion strategies are still oblivious to the unique characteristics of these storage devices. As a result, there is currently a lack of research effectively addressing the implementation of secure deletion for the emerging interlaced magnetic recording (IMR) technology. Regrettably, applying traditional read-modify-write (RMW) processes to enable secure deletion on IMR technology leads to significant challenges, such as severe write amplification (WA) and performance degradation. In this article, we propose move-on-cover (MOC), a novel secure deletion strategy for securely deleting on IMR, to optimize the performance of secure deletion. Specifically, when securely deleting a bottom track, the MOC first moves one of affected top track to a free top track, and then covers the to-be-deleted bottom track with another top track, minimizing redundant data backups and hiding secure deletion latency of bottom tracks. A series of evaluation experiments show that MOC is highly effective in reducing extra I/Os and improving the performance of secure deletion.
items.abstract_zh: 安全删除在保护隐私和保密方面发挥着至关重要的作用。历史上，磁存储设备上的安全删除是通过数据覆盖来实现的。然而，随着磁存储技术的快速进步，现有的安全删除策略仍然忽视了这些存储设备的独特特性。因此，目前缺乏有效解决新兴隔行磁记录（IMR）技术安全删除实现的研究。遗憾的是，应用传统的读取-修改-写入 (RMW) 流程来实现 IMR 技术上的安全删除会带来重大挑战，例如严重的写入放大 (WA) 和性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了 move-on-cover (MOC)，一种新颖的安全删除策略，用于在 IMR 上安全删除，以优化安全删除的性能。具体来说，当安全删除底部磁道时，MOC首先将受影响的顶部磁道之一移动到空闲的顶部磁道，然后用另一个顶部磁道覆盖要删除的底部磁道，最大限度地减少冗余数据备份并隐藏底部磁道的安全删除延迟。一系列评估实验表明，MOC在减少额外I/O和提高安全删除性能方面非常有效。

items.title: Improving Dependability of Distributed Real-Time Applications via Safety and Security Co-Design.
items.abstract: With the increasing deployment in mission-critical domains, it is of foremost importance to improve dependability of distributed real-time applications for cyber–physical systems (CPSs) with safety & security-critical threats. Different from existing works addressing the security or safety design separately, this article makes efforts to achieve the safety and security co-design from system-level perspective, especially considering the interplay between fault tolerance and security harden techniques. To guarantee the safety of real-time applications, fault-tolerant techniques, e.g., task re-execution and active replica, are leveraged to tolerate faults in task executions. To improve the security of distributed applications, cryptography is deployed to resist confidentiality attacks on messages delivered over the communication media. We analyze the impact of task’s fault tolerance on secure message communication, and then formulate the design problem as a multiobjective optimization problem, i.e., to minimize the failure probability and security vulnerability of the application while subject to given fault-tolerant constraints, execution constraints and deadline constraints. Since the optimization problem is NP-hard, we then propose an improved multiobjective optimization algorithm, called decomposition-based dependability co-optimization (DeDeCo) algorithm, to search for the optimal Pareto solutions of security and reliability harden assignments for messages and tasks, respectively. Extensive experiments and an industrial case evaluate the efficiency of DeDeCo, indicating that our design and optimization algorithm are suitable for improving the dependability of real-time applications running on security & safety-critical CPSs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着关键任务领域的部署不断增加，提高具有安全关键威胁的网络物理系统（CPS）的分布式实时应用程序的可靠性至关重要。与现有的单独解决安全或安全设计的工作不同，本文致力于从系统级角度实现安全和安全协同设计，特别是考虑容错和安全强化技术之间的相互作用。为了保证实时应用的安全，利用任务重执行、主动副本等容错技术来容忍任务执行中的错误。为了提高分布式应用程序的安全性，部署了加密技术来抵御对通过通信媒体传递的消息的机密性攻击。我们分析了任务容错对安全消息通信的影响，然后将设计问题表述为多目标优化问题，即在给定的容错约束、执行约束和期限约束的情况下，最小化应用程序的失败概率和安全漏洞。由于优化问题是 NP 难问题，因此我们提出了一种改进的多目标优化算法，称为基于分解的可靠性协同优化（DeDeCo）算法，以分别搜索消息和任务的安全性和可靠性强化分配的最优 Pareto 解。大量的实验和工业案例评估了 DeDeCo 的效率，表明我们的设计和优化算法适合提高在安全和安全关键型 CPS 上运行的实时应用程序的可靠性。

items.title: Detecting Spoofed Noisy Speeches via Activation-Based Residual Blocks for Embedded Systems.
items.abstract: Spoofed noisy speeches seriously threaten the speech-based embedded systems, such as smartphones and intelligent assistants. Consequently, we present an anti-spoofing detection model with activation-based residual blocks to identify spoofed noisy speeches with the requirements of high accuracy and low time overhead. Through theoretic analysis of noise propagation on shortcut connections of traditional residual blocks, we observe that different activation functions can help reducing the influence of noise under certain situations. Then, we propose a feature-aware activation function to weaken the influence of noise and enhance the anti-spoofing features on shortcut connections, in which a fine-grained processing is designed to remove noise and strengthen significant features. We also propose a variance-increasing-based optimization algorithm to find the optimal hyperparameters of the feature-aware activation function. Benchmark-based experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can reduce the average equal error rate of anti-spoofing detection from 21.72% to 4.51% and improve the accuracy by up to 37.06% and save up to 91.26% of time overhead on Jetson AGX Xavier compared with ten state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 欺骗性噪声语音严重威胁基于语音的嵌入式系统，例如智能手机和智能助理。因此，我们提出了一种具有基于激活的残差块的反欺骗检测模型，以识别具有高精度和低时间开销要求的欺骗噪声语音。通过对传统残差块的快捷连接上的噪声传播的理论分析，我们观察到不同的激活函数在某些情况下有助于减少噪声的影响。然后，我们提出了一种特征感知激活函数来削弱噪声的影响并增强快捷连接的反欺骗功能，其中设计了细粒度处理来消除噪声并增强重要特征。我们还提出了一种基于方差增加的优化算法来找到特征感知激活函数的最佳超参数。基于基准的实验表明，与十种最先进的方法相比，该方法可以将反欺骗检测的平均等错误率从 21.72% 降低到 4.51%，准确率提高高达 37.06%，并在 Jetson AGX Xavier 上节省高达 91.26% 的时间开销。

items.title: INDM: Chiplet-Based Interconnect Network and Dataflow Mapping for DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: Chiplet-based deep neural network (DNN) accelerator is a promising solution to balance the performance and manufacturing cost. However, different from monolithic chips, interconnect network design and architectural partitioning for multiple chiplets would result in a huge design space and make it difficult to keep scalability and high hardware utilization. Moreover, how to efficiently map DNN workloads onto multiple DRAM dies and compute dies is another major challenge. To alleviate the above issues, in this work, we propose INDM, a chiplet-based interconnect network and dataflow mapping co-optimization for DNN accelerators. First, we propose an efficient hierarchical interconnect network composed of a multiring on-die network and a cluster-based interdie network, to facilitate the data reuse and traffic pattern in DNN workloads. Second, architectural partitioning and topology exploration for chiplet-based DNN accelerators are proposed to find the optimal architecture configurations. Third, an interdie communication-aware dataflow mapping is proposed to minimize traffic congestion during DNN layer switching. We implement the proposed chiplet-based interconnect network design and dataflow mapping algorithm for a set of popular DNN models, including VGG-16, ResNet-18, DarkNet-19, ResNet-50, and ResNet-101. Experimental results show that as compared with the state-of-the-art related work, such as NN-Baton and SIMBA, our work achieves 26.00%–73.81% energy-delay-product (EDP) reduction and 26.93%–79.78% latency reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 Chiplet 的深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器是一种有前景的平衡性能和制造成本的解决方案。然而，与单片芯片不同，多个chiplet的互连网络设计和架构划分会导致巨大的设计空间，并且难以保持可扩展性和高硬件利用率。此外，如何有效地将 DNN 工作负载映射到多个 DRAM 芯片和计算芯片上是另一个重大挑战。为了缓解上述问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了 INDM，一种基于小芯片的互连网络和 DNN 加速器的数据流映射协同优化。首先，我们提出了一种高效的分层互连网络，由多环片上网络和基于集群的片间网络组成，以促进 DNN 工作负载中的数据重用和流量模式。其次，提出了基于小芯片的 DNN 加速器的架构划分和拓扑探索，以找到最佳架构配置。第三，提出了一种芯片间通信感知数据流映射，以最大限度地减少 DNN 层切换期间的流量拥塞。我们为一组流行的 DNN 模型（包括 VGG-16、ResNet-18、DarkNet-19、ResNet-50 和 ResNet-101）实现了所提出的基于小芯片的互连网络设计和数据流映射算法。实验结果表明，与最先进的相关工作（例如NN-Baton和SIMBA）相比，我们的工作实现了26.00%–73.81%的能量延迟产物（EDP）减少和26.93%–79.78%的延迟减少。

items.title: On Modeling and Detecting Trojans in Instruction Sets.
items.abstract: Amid growing concerns about hardware security, comprehensive security testing has become essential for chip certification. This article proposes a deep-testing method for identifying Trojans of particular concern to middle-to-high-end users, with a focus on illegal instructions. A hidden instruction Trojan can employ a low-probability sequence of normal instructions as a boot sequence, which is followed by an illegal instruction that triggers the Trojan. This enables the Trojan to remain deeply hidden within the processor. It then exploits an intrusion mechanism to acquire Linux control authority by setting a hidden interrupt as its payload. We have developed an unbounded model checking (UMC) technique to uncover such Trojans. The proposed UMC technique has been optimized with slicing based on the input cone, head-point replacement, and backward implication. Our experimental results demonstrate that the presented instruction Trojans can survive detection by existing methods, thus allowing normal users to steal root user privileges and compromising the security of processors. Moreover, our proposed deep-testing method is empirically shown to be a powerful and effective approach for detecting these instruction Trojans.
items.abstract_zh: 随着人们对硬件安全性的日益关注，全面的安全测试已成为芯片认证的必要条件。本文提出了一种针对中高端用户特别关注的木马的深度测试方法，重点关注非法指令。隐藏指令木马可以采用低概率的正常指令序列作为启动序列，其后跟随触发木马的非法指令。这使得特洛伊木马能够深深隐藏在处理器中。然后，它通过设置隐藏中断作为其负载，利用入侵机制来获取Linux控制权。我们开发了一种无界模型检查（UMC）技术来发现此类木马。所提出的 UMC 技术已通过基于输入锥体的切片、头点替换和后向蕴涵进行了优化。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的指令木马可以通过现有方法的检测而幸存下来，从而允许普通用户窃取root用户权限并损害处理器的安全。此外，我们提出的深度测试方法被经验证明是检测这些指令木马的强大而有效的方法。

items.title: SparseACC: A Generalized Linear Model Accelerator for Sparse Datasets.
items.abstract: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is widely used for training generalized linear models (GLMs), such as support vector machine and logistic regression, on large industry datasets. Such a training consumes plenty of computing power and therefore plenty of accelerators are proposed to accelerate the GLM training. However, real-world datasets are always highly sparse. For example, YouTube’s social network connectivity contains only 2.31% nonzero elements (NZs). It is not trivial to design an accelerator that is able to efficiently train on a sparse dataset that is stored in a compressed sparse format (e.g., compressed sparse row (CSR) format). The design of such an accelerator faces three challenges: 1) bank conflicts, which may happen when multiple processing engines in the accelerator access multiple memory banks; 2) complex interconnections, which are necessary to allow all processing engines to access any memory bank; and 3) high-synchronization overhead, since each sample in sparse dataset has a different number of NZs and these elements have different distributions, thus it is hard to overlap gradient computation and model update of neighboring batches. To this end, we propose SparseACC, a sparsity-aware accelerator for training generalized linear models (GLMs). SparseACC is based on two key mechanisms. First, a software/hardware co-design approach solves the first two design challenges by proposing a novel bank-conflict-free (BCF) and bank-balanced CSR format. Second, a weight-aware ping-pong model solves the third challenge, thus maximizing the utilization of the processing engines. SparseACC leverages these two mechanisms to orchestrate training over sparse datasets, such that the training time decreases linearly with the sparsity of the dataset. We prototype SparseACC on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA (Xilinx, 2020). The experimental evaluation shows that SparseACC converges up to 3.5× , 18× , 38× , and 110× faster than the state-of-the-art counterparts on a sparse accelerator, a Tesla V100 GPU, an Intel i9-10900k CPU, and a dense accelerator, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 随机梯度下降 (SGD) 广泛用于在大型行业数据集上训练广义线性模型 (GLM)，例如支持向量机和逻辑回归。这样的训练会消耗大量的计算能力，因此提出了大量的加速器来加速 GLM 的训练。然而，现实世界的数据集总是高度稀疏。例如，YouTube 的社交网络连接仅包含 2.31% 的非零元素 (NZ)。设计一个能够有效地训练以压缩稀疏格式（例如，压缩稀疏行（CSR）格式）存储的稀疏数据集的加速器并非易事。这种加速器的设计面临三个挑战：1）存储体冲突，当加速器中的多个处理引擎访问多个存储体时可能会发生存储体冲突； 2）复杂的互连，这是允许所有处理引擎访问任何存储体所必需的； 3）高同步开销，由于稀疏数据集中的每个样本具有不同数量的NZ，并且这些元素具有不同的分布，因此很难重叠相邻批次的梯度计算和模型更新。为此，我们提出了 SparseACC，一种稀疏感知加速器，用于训练广义线性模型（GLM）。 SparseACC 基于两个关键机制。首先，软件/硬件协同设计方法通过提出一种新颖的银行无冲突（BCF）和银行平衡的 CSR 格式来解决前两个设计挑战。其次，重量感知乒乓模型解决了第三个挑战，从而最大限度地提高了处理引擎的利用率。 SparseACC 利用这两种机制来协调稀疏数据集的训练，使得训练时间随着数据集的稀疏度线性减少。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA（Xilinx，2020）上构建了 SparseACC 原型。实验评估表明，SparseACC 收敛到 3.5× , 18× , 38× 和 110× 比稀疏加速器、Tesla V100 GPU、Intel 上最先进的同类产品快分别是 i9-10900k CPU 和密集加速器。

items.title: 3A-ReRAM: Adaptive Activation Accumulation in ReRAM-Based CNN Accelerator.
items.abstract: ReRAM-based computing is good at accelerating convolutional neural network (CNN) inference due to its high computing parallelism, but its rigid crossbar structure may become less efficient in the face of the random data sparsity abundant in CNNs. In this study, we propose 3A -ReRAM, a novel crossbar architecture that can dynamically predict the accumulated results to enable adaptive activation accumulation, so that both zero and small values in feature map can be exploited in each matrix-vector multiplication (MVM) operation for speedup. To dynamically predict the results, we propose an efficient parallel predictor to find larger adapted boxes for increased computing parallelism without hurting accuracy. For a better scheduling between the dynamic predictions, we propose an efficient input window management with light-weight hardware support. With dynamic prediction and calculation, 3A -ReRAM architecture naturally fits the ReRAM crossbar structure but enables a totally different way to dynamically exploit the sparsity and small values in feature maps. It greatly improves the performance by increasing the computing parallelism and saves energy consumption by much less analog-digital conversions. The evaluation results show that 3A -ReRAM architecture can increase the performance by up to 13.03× , 16.31× , 2.46× , and 2.58× compared to ReRAM-based CNN accelerators ISAAC, PUMA (sparsity-unaware) and SRE, FORMS (sparsity-aware), and the total energy can be reduced by 8.93× , 10.07× , 2.97× , and 4.58× , respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 基于ReRAM的计算由于其高计算并行性而擅长加速卷积神经网络（CNN）推理，但面对CNN中丰富的随机数据稀疏性，其严格的交叉结构可能会变得效率较低。在本研究中，我们提出了 3A -ReRAM，一种新颖的交叉架构，可以动态预测累积结果以实现自适应激活累积，因此在每个矩阵向量乘法（MVM）运算中都可以利用特征图中的零值和小值来加速。为了动态预测结果，我们提出了一种有效的并行预测器来找到更大的适应框以增加计算并行性而不损害准确性。为了更好地调度动态预测，我们提出了一种具有轻量级硬件支持的高效输入窗口管理。通过动态预测和计算， 3A -ReRAM 架构自然地适合 ReRAM 交叉结构，但支持一种完全不同的方式来动态利用特征图中的稀疏性和小值。它通过增加计算并行度极大地提高了性能，并通过更少的模数转换来节省能耗。评估结果表明， 3A -ReRAM架构最多可将性能提升 13.03× , 16.31× , 2.46× 和 2.58× 与基于 ReRAM 的 CNN 加速器 ISAAC、PUMA（稀疏性不感知）和 SRE、FORMS 相比（稀疏感知），并且总能量可以减少 8.93× , 10.07× , 2.97× 和 4.58× 分别。

items.title: MII: A Multifaceted Framework for Intermittence-Aware Inference and Scheduling.
items.abstract: The concurrent execution of deep neural networks (DNNs) inference tasks on the intermittently-powered batteryless devices (IPDs) has recently garnered much attention due to its potential in a broad range of smart sensing applications. While the checkpointing mechanisms (CMs) provided by the state-of-the-art make this possible, scheduling inference tasks on IPDs is still a complex problem due to significant performance variations across the DNN layers and CM choices. This complexity is further accentuated by dynamic environmental conditions and inherent resource constraints of IPDs. To tackle these challenges, we present MII, a framework designed for the intermittence-aware inference and scheduling on IPDs. MII formulates the shutdown and live time functions of an IPD from profiling the data, which our offline intermittence-aware search scheme uses to find the optimal layer-wise CMs for each task. At runtime, MII enhances the job success rates by dynamically making scheduling decisions to mitigate the workload losses from the power interruptions and adjusting these CMs in response to the actual energy patterns. Our evaluation demonstrates the superiority of MII over the state-of-the-art. In controlled environments, MII achieves an average increase of 21% and 39% in successful jobs under the stable and dynamic energy patterns. In the real-world settings, MII achieves 33% and 24% more successful jobs indoors and outdoors.
items.abstract_zh: 在间歇供电的无电池设备（IPD）上并发执行深度神经网络（DNN）推理任务最近因其在广泛的智能传感应用中的潜力而引起了广泛关注。虽然最先进的检查点机制 (CM) 使这成为可能，但由于 DNN 层和 CM 选择之间的性能差异很大，在 IPD 上调度推理任务仍然是一个复杂的问题。动态环境条件和 IPD 固有的资源限制进一步加剧了这种复杂性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 MII，这是一个专为 IPD 的间歇感知推理和调度而设计的框架。 MII 通过分析数据制定 IPD 的关闭和实时函数，我们的离线间歇感知搜索方案使用该函数来为每个任务找到最佳的逐层 CM。在运行时，MII 通过动态制定调度决策来减轻电源中断造成的工作负载损失并根据实际能源模式调整这些 CM，从而提高作业成功率。我们的评估证明了 MII 相对于最先进技术的优越性。在受控环境下，MII 在稳定和动态能源模式下的成功工作平均增长了 21% 和 39%。在现实环境中，MII 在室内和室外的工作成功率分别提高了 33% 和 24%。

items.title: PDG: A Prefetcher for Dynamic Graph Updating.
items.abstract: Dynamic graphs can be utilized to model many real-world applications like social media analysis in which the connections and entities evolve continuously. Hence, the processing of dynamic graphs is gaining increasing popularity. However, prior dynamic graph processing systems mainly focus on the optimization of graph analytics but overlook graph updating which manages the evolving graph structure and presents a unified view to graph analytics. Since graph updating operates on evolving graphs and involves a large number of irregular memory accesses, it poses a substantial influence on the performance of dynamic graph processing systems. In this work, we observe that graph updating is mainly bottlenecked by a frequent indirect memory access pattern ^*(^*(B[A[i]]+\mathrm offset)) . The pattern is inherent to the typical graph updating from the incoming edge stream to the base data store organized with either an adjacent list or a compressed sparse row. With this observation, we propose a novel prefetcher for dynamic graph updating abbreviated as PDG. PDG is a lightweight pipelined instruction-based prefetcher specialized for graph updating and it is also compatible with the irregular memory access pattern B[A[i]] widely used in graph analytics. In addition, it leverages a monitor of the instruction queue to decide the appropriate timing of prefetching to make the best use of the cache. According to our experiments, PDG achieves 1.60× , 1.26× , and 1.30× performance speedup compared to three representative prefetchers, respectively, with negligible hardware overhead in graph updating.
items.abstract_zh: 动态图可用于对许多现实世界的应用程序进行建模，例如社交媒体分析，其中连接和实体不断发展。因此，动态图的处理越来越受欢迎。然而，现有的动态图处理系统主要关注图分析的优化，而忽略了图更新，图更新管理不断发展的图结构并为图分析提供统一的视图。由于图更新是在不断演化的图上进行的，并且涉及大量不规则的内存访问，因此它对动态图处理系统的性能产生了重大影响。在这项工作中，我们观察到图更新主要受到频繁的间接内存访问模式的瓶颈 ^*(^*(B[A[i]]+\mathrm偏移量)) 。该模式是从传入边缘流到使用相邻列表或压缩稀疏行组织的基础数据存储的典型图形更新所固有的。根据这一观察，我们提出了一种用于动态图更新的新型预取器，缩写为 PDG。 PDG 是一种轻量级基于流水线指令的预取器，专门用于图形更新，它还与不规则内存访问模式兼容 B[A[i]] 广泛应用于图形分析。此外，它还利用指令队列监视器来决定预取的适当时机，以充分利用缓存。根据我们的实验，PDG 实现了 1.60× , 1.26× 和 1.30× 与三个代表性预取器相比，性能分别得到加速，并且图形更新中的硬件开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: RE-Specter: Examining the Architectural Features of Configurable CNN With Power Side-Channel.
items.abstract: As domain-specific training data is recognized as valuable intellectual property, acquiring well-trained weights in convolutional neural networks (CNN) has emerged as a new threat to the neural network design community. To design a CNN accelerator that is resilient to side-channel threats, it is crucial to have an accurate and efficient security-driven framework at the early design stage. However, there is no standard way to perform root-cause analysis on the power side channel that exists in FPGA-based CNN accelerators. Therefore, we build RE-Specter, a framework that facilitates security-driven design space exploration (DSE) across various building components, combination patterns, and parallelism configurations in CNNs. The goal is to fully understand the power side-channel effects resulting from architectural modifications or optimization decisions. We further compare the benchmarks considering precision, resource utilization, and power side-channel leakage. Finally, we experimentally explore the design space of various architectural features. The experimental results show that low-bit precision delivers more secure architectures ( 68.9× among DSPs, 2439× among LUTs) in measurement-to-disclosure (MTD), but mixed-precision strategies are necessary to maintain the model accuracy. For loop optimization, in 16-parallel scenario, accumulator-based architecture outperforms the architecture featuring an adder tree with the improvements of 8.28× in MTD and 1.38× in PST.
items.abstract_zh: 由于特定领域的训练数据被认为是有价值的知识产权，因此在卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中获取训练有素的权重已成为神经网络设计界的新威胁。要设计能够抵御侧通道威胁的 CNN 加速器，在早期设计阶段拥有准确、高效的安全驱动框架至关重要。然而，没有标准方法可以对基于 FPGA 的 CNN 加速器中存在的电源侧通道执行根本原因分析。因此，我们构建了 RE-Spectre，这是一个框架，可促进跨各种构建组件、组合模式和 CNN 中的并行配置的安全驱动设计空间探索 (DSE)。目标是充分了解架构修改或优化决策所产生的电源侧通道效应。我们进一步比较了考虑精度、资源利用率和功率侧信道泄漏的基准。最后，我们实验性地探索了各种建筑特征的设计空间。实验结 2439× 在 LUT 中），但混合精度策略是必要的保持模型的准确性。对于循环优化，在 16 并行场景中，基于累加器的架构优于采用加法器树的架构，改进为 8.28× $ MTD 中的 和 PST 中的 1.38× 。

items.title: Criticality-Aware EDF Scheduling for Constrained-Deadline Imprecise Mixed-Criticality Systems.
items.abstract: EDF-VD first focuses on the classic mixed-criticality task model in which all low-criticality (LO) tasks are abandoned in the high-criticality mode, which is an effective dynamic priority scheduling algorithm for mixed-criticality systems. However, it has low schedulability for the imprecise mixed-criticality (IMC) task model with constrained deadlines, in which LO tasks are provided graceful degradation services instead of being abandoned. In this article, we study how to improve schedulability for the IMC tasks model. First, we propose a novel criticalityaware EDF scheduling algorithm (CA-EDF) that tries to delay the LO task execution to improve schedulability. Second, we derive sufficient conditions of schedulability for CA-EDF based on the Demand Bound Function. Finally, we evaluate CA-EDF through extensive simulation. The experimental results indicate that CA-EDF can improve the schedulability ratio by about 13.10% compared to the existing algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: EDF-VD首先关注经典的混合关键性任务模型，其中所有低关键性（LO）任务在高关键性模式下被放弃，这是一种有效的混合关键性系统的动态优先级调度算法。然而，对于具有有限期限的不精确混合关键性（IMC）任务模型，它的可调度性较低，其中LO任务被提供优雅的降级服务而不是被放弃。在本文中，我们研究如何提高 IMC 任务模型的可调度性。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的关键性感知 EDF 调度算法（CA-EDF），该算法尝试延迟 LO 任务执行以提高可调度性。其次，我们基于需求约束函数推导了CA-EDF可调度性的充分条件。最后，我们通过广泛的模拟来评估 CA-EDF。实验结果表明，与现有算法相比，CA-EDF可提高可调度率约13.10%。

items.title: On-Device Continual Learning With STT-Assisted-SOT MRAM-Based In-Memory Computing.
items.abstract: Due to the separate memory and computation units in traditional von Neumann architecture, massive data transfer dominates the overall computing system’s power and latency, known as the “Memory-Wall” issue. Especially with ever-increasing deep learning-based AI model size and computing complexity, it becomes the bottleneck for state-of-the-art AI computing systems. To address this challenge, in-memory computing (IMC)-based Neural Network accelerators have been widely investigated to support AI computing within memory. However, most of those works focus only on inference. The on-device training and continual learning have not been well explored yet. In this work, for the first time, we introduce on-device continual learning with STT-assisted-SOT (SAS) magnetoresistive random-access memory (MRAM)-based IMC system. On the hardware side, we have fabricated a STT-assisted-SOT MRAM (SAS-MRAM) device prototype with 4 magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJs, each at 100 nm ×50 nm) sharing a common heavy metal layer, achieving significantly improved memory writing and area efficiency compared to traditional SOT-MRAM. Next, we designed fully digital IMC circuits with our SAS-MRAM to support both neural network inference and on-device learning. To enable efficient on-device continual learning for new task data, we present an 8-bit integer (INT8)-based continual learning algorithm that utilizes our SAS-MRAM IMC-supported bit-serial digital in-memory convolution operations to train a small parallel reprogramming network (Rep-Net) while freezing the major backbone model. Extensive studies have been presented based on our fabricated SAS-MRAM device prototype, cross-layer device-circuit benchmarking and simulation, as well as the on-device continual learning system evaluation.
items.abstract_zh: 由于传统冯·诺依曼架构中的内存和计算单元是分开的，海量数据传输主导了整个计算系统的功耗和延迟，即所谓的“内存墙”问题。特别是随着基于深度学习的人工智能模型规模和计算复杂性不断增加，它成为最先进的人工智能计算系统的瓶颈。为了应对这一挑战，基于内存计算 (IMC) 的神经网络加速器已得到广泛研究，以支持内存内的人工智能计算。然而，大多数这些著作只关注推理。设备上的培训和持续学习尚未得到很好的探索。在这项工作中，我们首次引入了基于 STT 辅助 SOT (SAS) 磁阻随机存取存储器 (MRAM) 的 IMC 系统的设备上持续学习。在硬件方面，我们制作了一个 STT 辅助 SOT MRAM (SAS-MRAM) 器件原型，具有 4 个磁隧道结 (MTJ，每个 100 nm) ×50 nm) 共享公共重金属层，与传统 SOT-MRAM 相比，显着提高了存储器写入和面积效率。接下来，我们使用 SAS-MRAM 设计了全数字 IMC 电路，以支持神经网络推理和设备上学习。为了实现新任务数据的高效设备上持续学习，我们提出了一种基于 8 位整数 (INT8) 的持续学习算法，该算法利用 SAS-MRAM IMC 支持的位串行数字内存卷积运算来训练小型并行重编程网络 (Rep-Net)，同时冻结主要骨干模型。基于我们制造的 SAS-MRAM 器件原型、跨层器件电路基准测试和仿真以及器件上持续学习系统评估，我们进行了广泛的研究。

items.title: ECG: Augmenting Embedded Operating System Fuzzing via LLM-Based Corpus Generation.
items.abstract: Embedded operating systems (Embedded OSs) power much of our critical infrastructure but are, in general, much less tested for bugs than general-purpose operating systems. Fuzzing Embedded OSs encounter significant roadblocks due to much less documented specifications, an inherent ineffectiveness in generating high-quality payloads. In this article, we propose ECG, an Embedded OS fuzzer empowered by large language models (LLMs) to sufficiently mitigate the aforementioned issues. ECG approaches fuzzing Embedded OS by automatically generating input specifications based on readily available source code and documentation, instrumenting and intercepting execution behavior for directional guidance information, and generating inputs with payloads according to the pregenerated input specifications and directional hints provided from previous runs. These methods are empowered by using an interactive refinement method to extract the most from LLMs while using established parsing checkers to validate the outputs. Our evaluation results demonstrate that ECG uncovered 32 new vulnerabilities across three popular open-source Embedded OS (RT-Linux, RaspiOS, and OpenWrt) and detected ten bugs in a commercial Embedded OS running on an actual device. Moreover, compared to Syzkaller, Moonshine, KernelGPT, Rtkaller, and DRLF, ECG has achieved additional kernel code coverage improvements of 23.20%, 19.46%, 10.96%, 15.47%, and 11.05%, respectively, with an overall average improvement of 16.02%. These results underscore ECG’s enhanced capability in uncovering vulnerabilities, thus contributing to the overall robustness and security of the Embedded OS.
items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式操作系统 (Embedded OS) 为我们的大部分关键基础设施提供支持，但一般来说，与通用操作系统相比，其错误测试要少得多。由于文档化规范少得多，生成高质量有效负载的固有低效性，模糊化嵌入式操作系统遇到了重大障碍。在本文中，我们提出了 ECG，这是一种由大型语言模型（LLM）支持的嵌入式操作系统模糊器，可以充分缓解上述问题。 ECG 通过基于现成的源代码和文档自动生成输入规范、检测和拦截定向指导信息的执行行为以及根据预先生成的输入规范和先前运行提供的方向提示生成带有有效负载的输入来模糊嵌入式操作系统。这些方法通过使用交互式细化方法来从法学硕士中提取最多内容，同时使用已建立的解析检查器来验证输出。我们的评估结果表明，ECG 在三种流行的开源嵌入式操作系统（RT-Linux、RaspiOS 和 OpenWrt）中发现了 32 个新漏洞，并在实际设备上运行的商业嵌入式操作系统中检测到了 10 个错误。此外，与 Syzkaller、Moonshine、KernelGPT、Rtkaller 和 DRLF 相比，ECG 分别实现了 23.20%、19.46%、10.96%、15.47% 和 11.05% 的额外内核代码覆盖率改进，总体平均改进为 16.02%。这些结果凸显了 ECG 发现漏洞的能力增强，从而有助于提高嵌入式操作系统的整体稳健性和安全性。

items.title: An Ising Model-Based Parallel Tempering Processing Architecture for Combinatorial Optimization.
items.abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) are prevalent in various domains and present formidable challenges for modern computers. Searching for the ground state of the Ising model emerges as a promising approach to solve these problems. Recent studies have proposed some annealing processing architectures based on the Ising model, aimed at accelerating the solution of COPs. However, most of them suffer from low solution accuracy and inefficient parallel processing. This article presents a novel parallel tempering processing architecture (PTPA) based on the fully connected Ising model to address these issues. The proposed modified parallel tempering algorithm supports multispin concurrent updates per replica and employs an efficient multireplica swap scheme, with fast speed and high accuracy. Furthermore, an independent pipelined spin update architecture is designed for each replica, which supports replica scalability while enabling efficient parallel processing. The PTPA prototype is implemented on FPGA with eight replicas, each with 1024 fully connected spins. It supports up to 64 spins for concurrent updates per replica and operates at 200 MHz. Different concurrency strategies are considered to further improve the efficiency of solving COPs. In the test of various G-set problems, PTPA achieves 3.2× faster solution speed along with 0.27% better average cut accuracy compared to a state-of-the-art FPGA-based Ising machine.
items.abstract_zh: 组合优化问题（COP）在各个领域都很普遍，给现代计算机带来了巨大的挑战。寻找伊辛模型的基态成为解决这些问题的一种有前途的方法。最近的研究提出了一些基于 Ising 模型的退火处理架构，旨在加速 COP 的求解。然而，它们中的大多数都存在求解精度低和并行处理效率低的问题。本文提出了一种基于全连接 Ising 模型的新型并行回火处理架构（PTPA）来解决这些问题。所提出的改进的并行调节算法支持每个副本的多自旋并发更新，并采用高效的多副本交换方案，速度快、精度高。此外，为每个副本设计了独立的流水线自旋更新架构，支持副本可扩展性，同时实现高效的并行处理。 PTPA 原型在 FPGA 上实现，具有八个副本，每个副本具有 1024 个完全连接的自旋。它支持每个副本最多 64 次旋转并发更新，并以 200 MHz 运行。考虑不同的并发策略，进一步提高求解COP的效率。在各种 G 集问题的测试中，PTPA 实现了更快的求解速度以及更快的求解速度。与最先进的基于 FPGA 的 Ising 机器相比，平均切割精度提高了 0.27%。

items.title: Intelligent Inverse Designs of Impedance Matching Circuits With Generative Adversarial Network.
items.abstract: Impedance matching circuits (IMCs) are crucial modules in radio frequency (RF) front-end components, devices, and systems, affecting the performance of the whole systems.
