However, the design process of IMCs has to require intense manual interventions with high computational costs. To alleviate this problem, a novel scheme for inversely designing IMCs is presented in this work based on neural network technology. Such IMC inverse design framework consists of two mapping-based deep neural networks (DNNs). The first one is an untrained generative adversarial network (GAN) that maps from the design requirements to the regularized S-parameters curves. The second one is an inversion network that maps from the S-parameters and the target impedance to the designed circuit parameters. With the cascaded GAN and inversion network, an efficient method for designing IMC-based filtering antenna is introduced, which takes about 1/17 the time compared to the traditional EM-based design and optimization methods. Further, three power amplifiers (PAs) with multiple IMCs are inversely-designed based on the proposed framework. In experimental demonstration, the elaborate prototypes are fabricated and measured, where the measured results fully satisfy the demand performance.
items.abstract_zh: 阻抗匹配电路（IMC）是射频（RF）前端组件、设备和系统中的关键模块，影响整个系统的性能。然而，IMC 的设计过程需要大量的人工干预，计算成本很高。为了缓解这个问题，本文提出了一种基于神经网络技术的逆向设计 IMC 的新方案。这种 IMC 逆向设计框架由两个基于映射的深度神经网络（DNN）组成。第一个是未经训练的生成对抗网络 (GAN)，它将设计要求映射到正则化的 S 参数曲线。第二个是反演网络，将 S 参数和目标阻抗映射到设计的电路参数。通过级联GAN和反演网络，提出了一种基于IMC的滤波天线设计的有效方法，与传统的基于EM的设计和优化方法相比，其时间约为1/17。此外，基于所提出的框架，对具有多个IMC的三个功率放大器（PA）进行了逆向设计。在实验演示中，制作并测量了精心制作的样机，测量结果完全满足需求性能。

items.title: Instiller: Toward Efficient and Realistic RTL Fuzzing.
items.abstract: Bugs exist in hardware, such as CPU. Unlike software bugs, these hardware bugs need to be detected before deployment. Previous fuzzing work in CPU bug detection has several disadvantages, e.g., the length of register transition level (RTL) input instructions keeps growing, and longer inputs are ineffective for fuzzing. In this article, we propose Instiller (Instruction Distiller), an RTL fuzzer based on ant colony optimization (ACO). First, to keep the input instruction length short and efficient in fuzzing, it distills input instructions with a variant of ACO (VACO). Next, related work cannot simulate realistic interruptions well in fuzzing, and Instiller solves the problem of inserting interruptions and exceptions in generating the inputs. Third, to further improve the fuzzing performance of Instiller, we propose hardware-based seed selection and mutation strategies. We implement a prototype and conduct extensive experiments against state-of-the-art fuzzing work in real-world target CPU cores. In experiments, Instiller has 29.4% more coverage than DiFuzzRTL. In addition, 17.0% more mismatches are detected by Instiller. With the VACO algorithm, Instiller generates 79.3% shorter input instructions than DiFuzzRTL, demonstrating its effectiveness in distilling the input instructions. In addition, the distillation leads to a 6.7% increase in execution speed on average.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件中存在缺陷，例如CPU。与软件错误不同，这些硬件错误需要在部署之前进行检测。以前在CPU错误检测中的模糊测试工作有几个缺点，例如，寄存器转换级别（RTL）输入指令的长度不断增长，并且较长的输入对于模糊测试无效。在本文中，我们提出了Instiller（指令Distiller），一种基于蚁群优化（ACO）的RTL模糊器。首先，为了保持输入指令长度短且模糊测试高效，它使用 ACO (VACO) 的变体来提取输入指令。其次，相关工作无法很好地模拟模糊测试中的真实中断，而Instiller解决了在生成输入时插入中断和异常的问题。第三，为了进一步提高 Instiller 的模糊性能，我们提出了基于硬件的种子选择和变异策略。我们实现了一个原型，并针对现实世界目标 CPU 核心中最先进的模糊测试工作进行了广泛的实验。在实验中，Instiller 的覆盖率比 DiFuzzRTL 高 29.4%。此外，Instiller 检测到的不匹配情况增加了 17.0%。使用 VACO 算法，Instiller 生成的输入指令比 DiFuzzRTL 短 79.3%，证明了其在提取输入指令方面的有效性。此外，蒸馏使执行速度平均提高 6.7%。

items.title: Blade-DA: Click-Based Asynchronous Resilient Circuit With Dynamic Delay Adjustment.
items.abstract: Asynchronous resilient circuits have demonstrated higher efficiency and robustness due to their flexible local control mechanism and ability to eliminate metastability, compared to the synchronous resilient circuits. This article proposes the Blade-DA template, which is an asynchronous resilient circuit that incorporates a delay adjustment scheme. The Blade-DA template utilizes the Click template to simplify circuit design with a larger timing resilient window (TRW). Additionally, the Blade-DA template integrates a dynamic delay adjustment controller, which adaptively tunes the TRW based on real-time timing error rates. In this way, this controller reduces the timing error rate to improve performance under unfavorable process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) corners. Moreover, we propose an optimization method of adding extra constraints to change the delay distribution, which further improves the performance of Blade-DA template. Compared to the previous controller with a large TRW, the proposed asynchronous controller offers a significant 81.65% improvement in maximum frequency and a 61.93% reduction in area while operating at the same frequency. Furthermore, the Blade-DA template is applied to a three-stage RISC-V processor, resulting in a 7.92%-14.78% performance improvement under unfavorable PVT conditions compared to the fixed TRW asynchronous template, while incurring only a 1.63% additional area cost.
items.abstract_zh: 与同步弹性电路相比，异步弹性电路由于其灵活的本地控制机制和消除亚稳态的能力而表现出更高的效率和鲁棒性。本文提出了 Blade-DA 模板，它是一种包含延迟调整方案的异步弹性电路。 Blade-DA 模板利用 Click 模板通过更大的时序弹性窗口 (TRW) 简化电路设计。此外，Blade-DA模板还集成了动态延迟调整控制器，可根据实时定时错误率自适应调整TRW。通过这种方式，该控制器降低了时序错误率，从而提高了在不利的工艺、电压和温度 (PVT) 条件下的性能。此外，我们提出了一种添加额外约束来改变延迟分布的优化方法，进一步提高了Blade-DA模板的性能。与之前具有大 TRW 的控制器相比，所提出的异步控制器在相同频率下运行时，最大频率显着提高了 81.65%，面积减少了 61.93%。此外，Blade-DA模板应用于三级RISC-V处理器，与固定TRW异步模板相比，在不利的PVT条件下性能提升了7.92%-14.78%，而仅增加了1.63%的面积成本。

items.title: Area-Efficient Barrett Modular Multiplication With Optimized Karatsuba Algorithm.
items.abstract: This article presents an area-efficient Barrett modular multiplication (BMM) algorithm, facilitating the development of cryptosystems like fully homomorphic encryption. Instead of implementing three normal multiplications required by classic BMM, our proposed BMM introduces optimizations for multiplication AB, truncated multiplication \lfloor AB/2^f \rfloor , and modular multiplication (MM) AB ~\text mod~2^f . Taking the 4-term Karatsuba algorithm as an example, an N-bit multiplication AB can be decomposed into 9~(N/4) -bit multiplications. Our optimized approaches for truncated multiplication and MM require an area equivalent to only 6.5~(N/4) -bit multiplications when f\approx N . Furthermore, our optimized Karatsuba multiplications introduce efficient (E, I) matrix pairs, circumventing area overhead from complex I matrices and sign extension in multiplication. We also employ encode algorithm to eliminate many additions needed in BMM and inside multiplications, significantly shortening critical path. Experimental results demonstrate the advantages of our proposed BMM in terms of throughput and area efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种面积高效的 Barrett 模乘 (BMM) 算法，促进了全同态加密等密码系统的开发。我们提出的 BMM 没有实现经典 BMM 所需的三个正常乘法，而是引入了乘法 AB、截断乘法的优化 \lfloor AB/2^f \rfloor 和模乘法 (MM) AB ~\text mod~2^f 位乘法。我们针对截断乘法和 MM 的优化方法需要的面积仅相当于 6.5~(N/4) -bit f\approx N 时的乘法。此外，我们优化的 Karatsuba 乘法引入了高效的 (E, I) 矩阵对，避免了复杂 I 矩阵的面积开销和乘法中的符号扩展。我们还采用编码算法来消除 BMM 和内部乘法中所需的许多加法，从而显着缩短关键路径。实验结果证明了我们提出的 BMM 在吞吐量和面积效率方面的优势。

items.title: Efficient Block Storage in the Cloud.
items.abstract: This article presents Ursal, an hard-disk drive (HDD)-only block storage system that achieves ultraefficiency, reliability, scalability and availability at low cost. Compared to existing block stores, such as Ursa, Ceph, and Sheepdog, Ursal has the following distinctions. First, since parallelism is harmful to the random I/O performance on HDDs, we restrict Ursal storage servers to conservatively perform parallel I/O on HDDs for avoiding I/O contention and reducing tail latency. Second, Ursal designs a proxy-based storage architecture to separate the high-level and low-level I/O logic, where for each virtual machine (VM) there is one Ursal proxy process running at the client VM side to control (at a high level) the procedure of server-side low-level I/O. Third, to alleviate the problem of low-random write performance of HDDs, Ursal selectively performs direct block writes on raw HDDs or indirect log appends to HDD journals (which are then asynchronously replayed to raw HDDs), depending on the characteristics of the workloads. Fourth, software failures are nontrivial in large-scale block storage systems of which the availability is vital to client VMs, and thus for high availability we design an efficient fault-tolerance mechanism by isolating the connection management module of Ursal proxy. We have implemented Ursal and deployed it at scale. Extensive evaluation results demonstrate that Ursal achieves much higher performance than the state-of-the-art solutions for underloaded scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍 Ursal，这是一种仅包含硬盘驱动器 (HDD) 的块存储系统，能够以低成本实现超高效、可靠性、可扩展性和可用性。与现有的块存储（例如 Ursa、Ceph 和 Sheepdog）相比，Ursal 具有以下特点。首先，由于并行性对 HDD 上的随机 I/O 性能有害，因此我们限制 Ursal 存储服务器在 HDD 上保守地执行并行 I/O，以避免 I/O 争用并减少尾延迟。其次，Ursal设计了一种基于代理的存储架构来分离高级和低级I/O逻辑，其中对于每个虚拟机（VM），在客户端VM端运行一个Ursal代理进程来（在高级）控制服务器端低级I/O的过程。第三，为了缓解HDD随机写入性能低的问题，Ursal根据工作负载的特点选择性地在原始HDD上执行直接块写入或将日志附加到HDD日志（然后异步重播到原始HDD）。第四，在大规模块存储系统中，软件故障非常重要，其可用性对于客户端虚拟机至关重要，因此为了实现高可用性，我们通过隔离Ursal代理的连接管理模块来设计高效的容错机制。我们已经实施并大规模部署了 Ursal。广泛的评估结果表明，Ursal 在负载不足的情况下实现了比最先进的解决方案更高的性能。

items.title: EDF-Based Energy-Efficient Semi-Clairvoyant Scheduling With Graceful Degradation.
items.abstract: Recent works introduce a semi-clairvoyant model, in which the system mode transition is revealed on the arrival of high-criticality jobs. To solve the problem of inconsistency between the correctness criterion for mixed-criticality systems (MCSs) with a semi-clairvoyant and the actual situation, we study the problem of schedulability and energy in MCS with the semi-clairvoyant model in this article. First, we propose a new correctness criterion for MCS with semi-clairvoyant and graceful degradation and develop the schedulability test based on demand bound function methods denoted as SCS-GD. Second, we propose an energy-efficient semi-clairvoyant scheduling algorithm based on SCS-GD denoted as EE-SCS-GD. Finally, we conduct an experimental evaluation of SCS-GD and EE-SCS-GD by synthetically generated task sets. The experimental results show that SCS-GD can improve the schedulability ratio by 5.98% compared to existing algorithms while EE-SCS-GD can save 56.17% energy compared to SCS-GD.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的工作引入了一种半透视模型，其中系统模式转变在高关键性工作到来时被揭示。针对半透视混合临界系统(MCS)的正确性判据与实际情况不一致的问题，本文研究了半透视模型MCS的可调度性和能量问题。首先，我们提出了一种新的具有半透视和优雅降级的MCS正确性标准，并开发了基于需求约束函数方法的可调度性测试，表示为SCS-GD。其次，我们提出了一种基于SCS-GD的节能半透视调度算法，表示为EE-SCS-GD。最后，我们通过综合生成的任务集对 SCS-GD 和 EE-SCS-GD 进行实验评估。实验结果表明，SCS-GD较现有算法可调度率提高5.98%，EE-SCS-GD较SCS-GD节能56.17%。

items.title: Fast Constraints Tuning via Transfer Learning and Multiobjective Optimization.
items.abstract: As the complexity of very-large-scale integration (VLSI) increases, empirically determining the design constraints necessary to achieve the optimal power, performance, and area (PPA) within the electronic design automation (EDA) workflow becomes more challenging. Design space exploration is capable of effectively and automatically identifying the design constraints required to attain the optimal PPA in VLSI designs. However, the absence of prior knowledge can lead to less efficient explorations. This article proposes a novel fast constraint tuning framework via transfer learning and multiobjective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) to find the optimal design constraints. First, we introduce transfer learning into MOBO by Gaussian Copula and transform the PPA data into residual observations. We propose to transfer the prior information of the implemented technologies to the advanced technology to optimize the parameter design space under the advanced technology. Second, we propose Gaussian process regression with an auto-encoder-based deep kernel as a surrogate model in MOBO. The auto-encoder-based deep kernel can extract more input features to make the surrogate model more precise. We employ the batch uncertainty-aware search acquisition function to improve exploration efficiency. Using this surrogate model and this acquisition function in MOBO can reduce the amount that EDA tools need to run. The average EDA tools running times of the proposed model is 204, and the average ADRS is 0.0373. Compared to state-of-the-art approaches, experiments on a CPU design reveal that a higher-quality Pareto frontier can be provided with a shorter running time.
items.abstract_zh: 随着超大规模集成 (VLSI) 复杂性的增加，凭经验确定在电子设计自动化 (EDA) 工作流程中实现最佳功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 所需的设计约束变得更具挑战性。设计空间探索能够有效、自动地识别在 VLSI 设计中实现最佳 PPA 所需的设计约束。然而，缺乏先验知识可能会导致探索效率较低。本文提出了一种新颖的快速约束调整框架，通过迁移学习和多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）来找到最佳设计约束。首先，我们通过 Gaussian Copula 将迁移学习引入 MOBO，并将 PPA 数据转换为残差观测值。我们建议将已实现技术的先验信息转移到先进技术中，以优化先进技术下的参数设计空间。其次，我们提出使用基于自动编码器的深度内核作为 MOBO 中的代理模型的高斯过程回归。基于自动编码器的深度内核可以提取更多的输入特征，使代理模型更加精确。我们采用批量不确定性感知搜索获取功能来提高探索效率。在 MOBO 中使用此代理模型和此采集功能可以减少 EDA 工具需要运行的数量。所提出模型的平均 EDA 工具运行次数为 204，平均 ADRS 为 0.0373。与最先进的方法相比，CPU 设计的实验表明，可以在更短的运行时间内提供更高质量的帕累托前沿。

items.title: AutoAI2C: An Automated Hardware Generator for DNN Acceleration on Both FPGA and ASIC.
items.abstract: Recent advancements in deep neural networks (DNNs) and the slowing of Moore’s law have made domain-specific hardware accelerators for DNNs (i.e., DNN chips) a promising means for enabling more extensive DNN applications. However, designing DNN chips is challenging due to: 1) the vast and nonstandardized design space and 2) different DNN models’ varying performance preferences regarding hardware micro-architecture and dataflows. Therefore, designing a DNN chip often takes a large team of interdisciplinary experts months to years. To enable flexible and efficient DNN chip design, we propose AutoAI2C : a DNN chip generator that can automatically generate both FPGA- and ASIC-based DNN accelerator implementation (i.e., synthesizable hardware and deployment code) with optimized algorithm-to-hardware mapping, given the DNN model specification from mainstream machine learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch). Specifically, AutoAI2C consists of two major components: 1) a Chip Predictor , which can efficiently and reliably predict a DNN accelerator’s energy, latency, and resource consumption using the proposed graph-based intermediate accelerator representation and 2) a Chip Builder , which can generate and optimize DNN accelerator designs by automatically exploring the design space based on targeting metrics and the Chip Predictor ’s performance feedback. Extensive experiments show that our Chip Predictor ’s predictions differ by generated accelerators can achieve performance comparable to or better than state-of-the-art accelerators, achieving up to a 2.12× throughput improvements or 2.4× latency reduction with the same level of hardware resource usage, or reducing energy consumption by up to 1.6× , when running the same DNN workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的最新进展和摩尔定律的放缓使得 DNN 的特定领域硬件加速器（即 DNN 芯片）成为实现更广泛的 DNN 应用的有希望的手段。然而，设计 DNN 芯片具有挑战性，因为：1）巨大且非标准化的设计空间；2）不同的 DNN 模型在硬件微架构和数据流方面的性能偏好不同。因此，设计 DNN 芯片通常需要大型跨学科专家团队数月至数年的时间。为了实现灵活高效的 DNN 芯片设计，我们提出了 AutoAI2C：一种 DNN 芯片生成器，可以自动生成基于 FPGA 和 ASIC 的 DNN 加速器实现（即，可合成的硬件和部署代码），并经过优化算法到硬件的映射，考虑到主流机器学习框架（例如 PyTorch）的 DNN 模型规范。具体来说， AutoAI2C 由两个主要组件组成：1) Chip Predictor ，它可以使用所提出的基于图的中间加速器表示高效可靠地预测 DNN 加速器的能量、延迟和资源消耗，以及 2) Chip Builder ，它可以根据目标指标和 Chip Predictor 性能自动探索设计空间，从而生成和优化 DNN 加速器设计反馈。大量实验表明，我们的 Chip Predictor 的预测与实际测量值相差 <10%。此外，AutoAI2C生成的加速器可以实现与最先进的加速器相当或更好的性能，达到 2.12× 吞吐量改进或 2.4× 在硬件资源使用水平相同的情况下减少延迟，或减少高达 1.6× ，运行相同的 DNN 工作负载时。

items.title: Implementing Neural Networks on Nonvolatile FPGAs With Reprogramming.
items.abstract: NV-FPGAs have attracted significant attention in research due to their high density, low leakage power, and reduced error rates. The nonvolatile memory (NVM) crossbar’s compute-in-memory (CiM) capability further enables NV-FPGAs to execute high-efficiency, high-throughput neural network (NN) inference tasks. However, with the rapid increase in network size and considering that the parameter size often exceeds the memory capacity of the field programmable gate array (FPGA), implementing the entire network on a single FPGA chip becomes impractical. In this article, we utilize FPGA’s inherent run time reprogramming feature to implement oversized NNs on NV-FPGAs. This approach splits NN models into multiple tasks for the cyclical execution. Specifically, we propose a performance-driven task adapter (PD-Adapter), which aims to achieve high-performance NN inference by employing the task deployment to optimize settings, such as processing element size and quantity, and the task switching to select the most suitable switching type for each task. We integrate the proposed PD-Adapter into an open-source toolchain and evaluate it. Experimental results demonstrate that the PD-Adapter can achieve a run time reduction of 85.37% and 76.12% compared to the baseline and execution-time-first policy, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: NV-FPGA 因其高密度、低泄漏功率和降低的错误率而在研究中引起了广泛关注。非易失性存储器 (NVM) 交叉开关的内存计算 (CiM) 功能进一步使 NV-FPGA 能够执行高效率、高吞吐量的神经网络 (NN) 推理任务。然而，随着网络规模的迅速增加，并且考虑到参数大小往往超过现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的存储容量，在单个FPGA芯片上实现整个网络变得不切实际。在本文中，我们利用 FPGA 固有的运行时重编程功能在 NV-FPGA 上实现超大神经网络。这种方法将神经网络模型分割成多个任务来循环执行。具体来说，我们提出了一种性能驱动的任务适配器（PD-Adapter），旨在通过使用任务部署来优化设置（例如处理元素大小和数量）以及任务切换来为每个任务选择最合适的切换类型来实现高性能神经网络推理。我们将提议的 PD-Adapter 集成到开源工具链中并对其进行评估。实验结果表明，与基线和执行时间优先策略相比，PD-Adapter 的运行时间分别减少了 85.37% 和 76.12%。

items.title: ROI-HIT: Region of Interest-Driven High-Dimensional Microarchitecture Design Space Exploration.
items.abstract: Exploring the design space of RISC-V processors faces significant challenges due to the vastness of the high-dimensional design space and the associated expensive simulation costs. This work proposes a region of interest (ROI)-driven method, which focuses on the promising ROIs to reduce the over-exploration on the huge design space and improve the optimization efficiency. A tree structure based on self-organizing map (SOM) networks is proposed to partition the design space into ROIs. To reduce the high dimensionality of design space, a variable selection technique based on a sensitivity matrix is developed to prune unimportant design parameters and efficiently hit the optimum inside the ROIs. Moreover, an asynchronous parallel strategy is employed to further save the time taken by simulations. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method, achieving improvements of up to 43.82% in performance, 33.20% in power consumption, and 11.41% in area compared to state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 由于高维设计空间的巨大性和相关昂贵的仿真成本，探索 RISC-V 处理器的设计空间面临着重大挑战。这项工作提出了一种兴趣区域（ROI）驱动的方法，该方法专注于有前途的ROI，以减少对巨大设计空间的过度探索并提高优化效率。提出了一种基于自组织映射（SOM）网络的树结构，将设计空间划分为 ROI。为了降低设计空间的高维性，开发了一种基于灵敏度矩阵的变量选择技术，以修剪不重要的设计参数并有效地达到 ROI 内的最佳值。此外，采用异步并行策略进一步节省仿真时间。实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的优越性，与最先进的方法相比，性能提高了 43.82%，功耗提高了 33.20%，面积提高了 11.41%。

items.title: Polynomial Neural Barrier Certificate Synthesis of Hybrid Systems via Counterexample Guidance.
items.abstract: This article presents a novel approach to the safety verification of hybrid systems by synthesizing neural barrier certificates (BCs) via counterexample-guided neural network (NN) learning combined with sum-of-square (SOS)-based verification. We learn more easily verifiable BCs with NN polynomial expansions in a high-accuracy counterexamples guided framework. By leveraging the polynomial candidates yielded from the learning phase, we reformulate the identification of real BCs as convex linear matrix inequality (LMI) feasibility testing problems, instead of directly solving the inherently NP-hard nonconvex bilinear matrix inequality (BMI) problems associated with SOS-based BC generation. Furthermore, we decompose the large SOS verification programming into several manageable subprogrammings. Benefiting from the efficiency and scalability advantages, our approach can synthesize BCs not amenable to existing methods and handle more general hybrid systems.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种混合系统安全验证的新方法，通过反例引导的神经网络 (NN) 学习与基于平方和 (SOS) 的验证相结合来合成神经屏障证书 (BC)。我们在高精度反例指导框架中通过神经网络多项式展开学习更容易验证的BC。通过利用学习阶段产生的候选多项式，我们将真实 BC 的识别重新表述为凸线性矩阵不等式 (LMI) 可行性测试问题，而不是直接解决与基于 SOS 的 BC 生成相关的固有 NP 难非凸双线性矩阵不等式 (BMI) 问题。此外，我们将大型 SOS 验证程序分解为几个可管理的子程序。受益于效率和可扩展性优势，我们的方法可以合成不适用于现有方法的BC并处理更通用的混合系统。

items.title: TPE-Det: A Tamper-Proof External Detector via Hardware Traces Analysis Against IoT Malware.
items.abstract: With the widespread use of Internet of Things (IoT) devices, malware detection has become a hot spot for both academic and industrial communities. A series of solutions based on system calls, system logs, or hardware performance counters achieve promising results. However, such internal monitors are easily tampered with, especially against adaptive adversaries. In addition, existing system log records typically exhibit substantial volume, resulting in data explosion problems. In this article, we present TPE-Det, a side-channel-based external monitor to cope with these issues. Specifically, TPE-Det leverages the serial peripheral interface bus to extract the on-chip traces and designs a recovery pipeline for operating logs. The advantages of this external monitor are adversary-unperceived and tamper-proof. The restored logs mainly include file operation commands, which are lightweight compared to complete records. Meanwhile, we deploy a series of machine learning models with respect to statistical, sequence, and graph features to identify malware. Empirical evaluation shows that our proposal has tamper-proof capability, high-detection accuracy, and low-time/space overhead compared to state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）设备的广泛使用，恶意软件检测已成为学术界和工业界的热点。一系列基于系统调用、系统日志或硬件性能计数器的解决方案取得了可喜的结果。然而，这种内部监视器很容易被篡改，尤其是针对适应性强的对手。此外，现有的系统日志记录通常量很大，导致数据爆炸问题。在本文中，我们推出了 TPE-Det，一种基于侧通道的外部监视器来解决这些问题。具体来说，TPE-Det 利用串行外设接口总线提取片上痕迹并设计操作日志的恢复管道。这种外部显示器的优点是对手无法察觉并且防篡改。恢复的日志主要包括文件操作命令，与完整记录相比，这些命令是轻量级的。同时，我们部署了一系列关于统计、序列和图形特征的机器学习模型来识别恶意软件。实证评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的建议具有防篡改能力、高检测精度和低时间/空间开销。

items.title: A Distributed and Parallel Accelerator Design for 3-D Acoustic Imaging on FPGA-Based Systems.
items.abstract: 3-D imaging sonar is crucial in the exploration of marine resources, and the development of portable device with high-imaging quality and high-real-time performance is the general trend. However, traditional framework methods are limited by the huge amount of computation brought by high-quality imaging, making it difficult to implement in engineering. To address this issue, we develop 3-D real-time sonar system in an algorithm-hardware co-designed way. An ultrawideband distributed and parallel subarray beamforming algorithm (UWB-DPS) is proposed for 3-D acoustic imaging. This is a multistage array time-frequency beamforming method under a distributed parallel computing architecture. Based on this, we propose field-programmable gate array (FPGA)-based accelerator. It divides a large sonar receiving planar array into multiple parallel subarrays, and complete the beamforming in two stages, which can reduce the calculation load and speeds up 3-D imaging. For engineering implementation, we optimized the sparseness of the planar transducer array, with a sparse rate as high as 97.7%. The experimental results show that the calculation amount of the proposed UWB-DPS algorithm is reduced to 1/5.7 of the traditional framework algorithm, the imaging performance is effectively improved, and the FPGA-based accelerator outperforms the CPU software implementation by 935 × .
items.abstract_zh: 3D成像声纳对于海洋资源勘探至关重要，发展高成像质量、高实时性的便携式设备是大势所趋。然而，传统的框架方法受限于高质量成像带来的巨大计算量，难以在工程中实现。为了解决这个问题，我们以算法-硬件协同设计的方式开发了3D实时声纳系统。提出了一种用于 3D 声学成像的超宽带分布式并行子阵列波束形成算法 (UWB-DPS)。这是一种分布式并行计算架构下的多级阵列时频波束形成方法。基于此，我们提出了基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的加速器。它将大型声纳接收平面阵列划分为多个并行的子阵列，并分两阶段完成波束形成，可以减少计算量并加快3D成像速度。为了工程实现，我们对平面换能器阵列的稀疏度进行了优化，稀疏率高达97.7%。实验结果表明，所提出的UWB-DPS算法的计算量降低至传统框架算法的1/5.7，成像性能得到有效提升，基于FPGA的加速器比CPU软件实现的性能提高了935%。 $\times $ 。

items.title: Automatic Mapping of Heterogeneous DNN Models on Adaptive Multiaccelerator Systems.
items.abstract: As DNNs are developing rapidly, the computational and memory burden imposed on hardware systems grows exponentially. This becomes even more severe for large language models (LLMs) and multimodal models. As a promising solution that achieves high scalability and low manufacturing cost, multiaccelerator systems widely exist in data centers, cloud platforms, and mobile SoCs. Thus, a challenging problem arises: selecting a proper combination of accelerators from available designs and searching for efficient DNN mapping strategies, to fully exploit computation resources and communication bandwidth in the system. To this end, we propose MARS, a novel mapping framework that performs computation-aware accelerator selection and applies communication-aware sharding strategies to maximize parallelism. We also provide optimizations to overlap the computation and communication latency. Considering the high complexity of the design space, we propose two effective mapping algorithms to explore it. Experiments show that MARS achieves 34.3% latency reduction for DNN workloads compared to the baseline and 63.0% latency reduction on heterogeneous models compared to the corresponding state-of-the-art method.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 DNN 的快速发展，硬件系统的计算和内存负担呈指数级增长。对于大型语言模型（LLM）和多模态模型来说，这变得更加严重。作为一种具有高可扩展性和低制造成本的有前途的解决方案，多加速器系统广泛存在于数据中心、云平台和移动SoC中。因此，一个具有挑战性的问题出现了：从可用设计中选择合适的加速器组合，并寻找高效的 DNN 映射策略，以充分利用系统中的计算资源和通信带宽。为此，我们提出了 MARS，一种新颖的映射框架，它执行计算感知加速器选择并应用通信感知分片策略以最大化并行性。我们还提供优化来重叠计算和通信延迟。考虑到设计空间的高度复杂性，我们提出了两种有效的映射算法来探索它。实验表明，与基线相比，MARS 在 DNN 工作负载上实现了 34.3% 的延迟减少，与相应的最先进方法相比，在异构模型上实现了 63.0% 的延迟减少。

items.title: OPT-GCN: A Unified and Scalable Chiplet-Based Accelerator for High-Performance and Energy-Efficient GCN Computation.
items.abstract: As the size of real-world graphs continues to grow at an exponential rate, performing the graph convolutional network (GCN) inference efficiently is becoming increasingly challenging. Prior works that employ a unified computing engine with a predefined computation order lack the necessary flexibility and scalability to handle diverse input graph datasets. In this article, we introduce OPT-GCN, a chiplet-based accelerator design that performs GCN inference efficiently while providing flexibility and scalability through an architecture-algorithm co-design. On the architecture side, the proposed design integrates a unified computing engine in each chiplet and an active interposer, both of which are adaptable to efficiently perform the GCN inference and facilitate data communication. On the algorithm side, we propose dynamic scheduling and mapping algorithms to optimize memory access and on-chip computations for diverse GCN applications. Experimental results show that the proposed design provides a memory access reduction by a factor of 11.3× , 3.4× , and 1.4× , and energy savings of 15.2× , 3.7× , and 1.6× on average compared to HyGCN, AWB-GCN, and GCNAX, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现实世界图的大小继续以指数速度增长，高效执行图卷积网络（GCN）推理变得越来越具有挑战性。先前的工作采用具有预定义计算顺序的统一计算引擎，缺乏处理不同输入图数据集所需的灵活性和可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍 OPT-GCN，这是一种基于小芯片的加速器设计，可高效执行 GCN 推理，同时通过架构算法协同设计提供灵活性和可扩展性。在架构方面，所提出的设计在每个小芯片和有源中介层中集成了统一计算引擎，两者都适合高效执行 GCN 推理并促进数据通信。在算法方面，我们提出了动态调度和映射算法来优化各种 GCN 应用的内存访问和片上计算。实验结果表明，所提出的设计将内存访问减少了 11.3× , 3.4× 和 1.4× ，以及 15.2× , 3.7× 和 与 HyGCN、AWB-GCN 和 GCNAX 相比，平均成本分别为 1.6 美元× 。

items.title: AdaOPC 2.0: Enhanced Adaptive Mask Optimization Framework for via Layers.
items.abstract: Optical proximity correction (OPC) is a widely used technique to enhance the printability of designs in various foundaries. Recently, there has been a growing interest in using rigorous numerical optimization and machine learning to improve the robustness and efficiency of OPC. Our research focuses on developing a self-adaptive OPC framework that leverages the properties of pattern distribution and repetition in design layouts to optimize the correction process. We observe that different subregions in a design layer have varying pattern complexities, and many patterns repeat themselves throughout the layout. By exploiting these properties, we propose a framework that adaptively selects the most suitable OPC solvers from an extensible pool to optimize the correction process for each pattern based on its complexity. This approach allows for a co-optimization of speed and accuracy. Additionally, we introduce a graph-based dynamic pattern library that reuses optimized masks for repeated patterns, further accelerating the OPC flow. Our experimental results demonstrate a significant improvement in both performance and efficiency using our proposed framework.
items.abstract_zh: 光学邻近校正 (OPC) 是一种广泛使用的技术，可增强各种铸造厂设计的可印刷性。最近，人们对使用严格的数值优化和机器学习来提高 OPC 的鲁棒性和效率越来越感兴趣。我们的研究重点是开发一种自适应 OPC 框架，该框架利用设计布局中的图案分布和重复特性来优化校正过程。我们观察到设计层中的不同子区域具有不同的图案复杂性，并且许多图案在整个布局中重复出现。通过利用这些属性，我们提出了一个框架，该框架可以从可扩展池中自适应地选择最合适的 OPC 求解器，以根据每个模式的复杂性优化其校正过程。这种方法可以同时优化速度和准确性。此外，我们还引入了基于图形的动态模式库，该库可重复使用优化的掩模来重复模式，从而进一步加速 OPC 流程。我们的实验结果表明，使用我们提出的框架，性能和效率都有显着提高。

items.title: Hardware-Software Co-Design Enabling Static and Dynamic Sparse Attention Mechanisms.
items.abstract: The attention mechanisms of transformers effectively extract pertinent information from the input sequence. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention incurs heavy computational and memory burdens. Sparse attention techniques, including both static and dynamic sparsity, reduce the quadratic complexity by computing attention on partial queries and keys. These static and dynamic methods exhibit a tradeoff between efficiency and adaptability, making them applicable to different scenarios. However, existing accelerators either target-specific domains or encounter performance degradation when dealing with long sequences. None of them can enable static and dynamic sparse attention mechanisms simultaneously. To this end, we propose SALO2, a hardware–software co-design framework that facilitates efficient static and dynamic sparse attention computations and can be applied to various scenarios, tasks, and inputs. Experiments show that SALO2 achieves 104.80× , 13.65× , and 1.38× speedup compared to Intel Xeon CPU, NVIDIA RTX4090 GPU, and SALO (the SOTA accelerator exploiting static sparsity) on tasks with long input sequences, and achieves 76.17× , 8.98× , and 1.71× speedup compared to Intel Xeon CPU, NVIDIA RTX4090 GPU, and Sanger (the SOTA accelerator exploiting dynamic sparsity) on tasks with shorter sequences. The source code is available at https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/SALO.git .
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 的注意力机制有效地从输入序列中提取相关信息。然而，自注意力的二次复杂度会带来沉重的计算和内存负担。稀疏注意力技术（包括静态和动态稀疏性）通过计算部分查询和键的注意力来降低二次复杂度。这些静态和动态方法表现出效率和适应性之间的权衡，使其适用于不同的场景。然而，现有的加速器要么针对特定领域，要么在处理长序列时遇到性能下降。它们都不能同时启用静态和动态稀疏注意力机制。为此，我们提出了 SALO2，一种软硬件协同设计框架，可促进高效的静态和动态稀疏注意力计算，并可应用于各种场景、任务和输入。实验表明，SALO2实现了 104.80× , 13.65× 和 1.38× 与 Intel Xeon CPU、NVIDIA RTX4090 GPU 和 SALO（利用静态的 SOTA 加速器）相比，速度提升在具有长输入序列的任务上实现了稀疏性），并实现了 76.17× , 8.98× 和 1.71× 与 Intel Xeon CPU、NVIDIA RTX4090 GPU 和 Sanger（利用动态技术的 SOTA 加速器）相比，速度提升稀疏性）用于具有较短序列的任务。源代码位于 https://github.com/sjtu-zhao-lab/SALO.git 。

items.title: PhGraph: A High-Performance ReRAM-Based Accelerator for Hypergraph Applications.
items.abstract: Hypergraph processing has emerged as an effective approach to analyze complex multilateral relationships in real-world scenarios. Existing hypergraph processing solutions based on conventional architectures are severely bottlenecked by off-chip memory accesses. In this article, we propose the first processing-in-memory (PIM)-featured ReRAM-based hypergraph accelerator, dubbed PhGraph, which facilitates performance- and energy-efficient hypergraph processing. On the hardware level, PhGraph integrates analog memristor-based PIM (with high-matrix-grained parallelism) and digital memristor-based PIM (for high-bipartite-edge-grained efficiency) into one standalone solution. On the software level, an overlap-aware hypergraph partitioning mechanism is proposed to polarize hypergraph workloads into matrix-formatted dense and bipartite-edge-formatted sparse partitions for performance acceleration using analog memristor-based PIM and digital ones, respectively. In addition, PhGraph is equipped with load-balanced partition scheduling and algorithm mapping co-designs to boost hardware utilization and efficiency. Experimental results show that PhGraph outperforms the state-of-the-art CPU-, FPGA-, and ASIC-based solutions by up to 4, 309.81× , 547.13× , and 166.76× in terms of performance, and 36, 416.11× , 924.12× , and 41.44× in terms of energy-savings, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 超图处理已成为分析现实场景中复杂多边关系的有效方法。基于传统架构的现有超图处理解决方案受到片外存储器访问的严重瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于内存处理（PIM）的基于 ReRAM 的超图加速器，称为 PhGraph，它促进了性能和能源高效的超图处理。在硬件层面，PhGraph 将基于模拟忆阻器的 PIM（具有高矩阵粒度并行性）和基于数字忆阻器的 PIM（用于高二分边缘粒度效率）集成到一个独立的解决方案中。在软件层面，提出了一种重叠感知超图分区机制，将超图工作负载极化为矩阵格式的密集分区和二分边格式的稀疏分区，分别使用基于模拟忆阻器的 PIM 和数字 PIM 来加速性能。此外，PhGraph还配备了负载均衡分区调度和算法映射协同设计，以提高硬件利用率和效率。实验结果表明，PhGraph 的性能比最先进的基于 CPU、FPGA 和 ASIC 的解决方案高出 4 倍。 notation="LaTeX">$309.81\times $ ， 547.13× 和 166.76× 在性能方面，以及36、 416.11× , $924.12\times $ 和 41.44× 分别在节能方面。

items.title: The First Implementation of a Memtranstor Emulator and its Artificial Synaptic Plasticity Analysis.
items.abstract: Memtranstor (MT) is proposed as a complement to the concept of memory element, which is conceived based on a direct correlation between magnetic flux \varphi and charge q . The electrical characteristics of MT is different from other memory elements, which enables MT to have more application scenarios. Thus, we design a floating MT emulator containing a constitutive DC control voltage v_\mathrm s to mimic a hardware MT. In this emulator, the inverse memtranstance (M_T^-1) can be directly measured and divided into two different states, namely, State 1: M_T^-1 is always positive or always negative, State 2: M_T^-1 is either positive or negative. We propose a control method of changing the direction and magnitude of the electric field of v_\mathrm s to achieve these two different states. For the proposed MT emulator, we also analyze typical nonlinear characteristics of pinched hysteresis loops (PHLs) and the variation of M_T^-1 under different v_\mathrm s and sinusoidal excitation frequencies. The correctness and feasibility of the emulator have been systematically validated through theoretical analysis, PSPICE simulation, and hardware experiments. To further demonstrate the potential application of MT, we verify artificial synaptic plasticity of the MT emulator by experiments. The experiments results show that MT emulator can resemble long-term potentiation and long-term depression. The proposed MT emulator has a certain reference value for future research of MT-based nonlinear dynamics and can facilitate MT-based application research.
items.abstract_zh: Memtranstor (MT) 被提出作为存储元件概念的补充，它是基于磁通量之间的直接相关性而构思的 \varphi 并收费 q 。 MT的电气特性与其他存储元件不同，这使得MT有更多的应用场景。因此，我们设计了一个包含本构直流控制电压的浮动 MT 仿真器 v_\mathrm s 模仿硬件 MT。在这个模拟器中，可以直接测量反忆阻值 (M_T^-1) 并分为两种不同的状态，即状态 1： M_T^-1 始终为正或始终为负，状态 2： M_T^-1 可以是正数，也可以是负数。我们提出了一种改变 v_\mathrm s 电场方向和大小的控制方法来实现这两个不同的州。对于所提出的 MT 仿真器，我们还分析了收缩磁滞回线 (PHL) 的典型非线性特性以及 M_T^-1$ 的变化 不同 v_\mathrm s 和正弦激励下频率。通过理论分析、PSPICE仿真和硬件实验，系统地验证了仿真器的正确性和可行性。为了进一步证明 MT 的潜在应用，我们通过实验验证了 MT 模拟器的人工突触可塑性。实验结果表明，MT模拟器可以模拟长时程增强和长时程抑制。所提出的MT仿真器对于未来基于MT的非线性动力学研究具有一定的参考价值，并且可以促进基于MT的应用研究。

items.title: Multiobjective Optimization for PSIJ Mitigation and Impedance Improvement Based on PCPS/DR-NSDE in Chiplet-Based 2.5-D Systems.
items.abstract: The utilization of modular chiplets in interposer-based 2.5-D heterogeneous systems simplifies fabrication and design, however, it also introduces significant noise challenges. This article presents a collaborative jitter-aware optimization in 2.5-D integrated circuits (ICs), incorporating power supply induced jitter (PSIJ), system impedance, target impedance, and decoupling capacitors, based on the hybrid precomputation and prestorage/duplicate removal-nondominated sorting differential evolution (PCPS/DR-NSDE) algorithm. An automatic channel model algorithm and a uniform decoupling capacitor placement strategy are proposed to improve the design efficiency. Then, the system transfer impedance, simultaneous switch current, sensitivity function, and amplification factor are individually modeled, leading to the assembly and verification of the final PSIJ in the 2.5-D system. A precomputation and prestorage (PCPS) strategy is proposed to handle high-time-consuming modules in the objective function and a duplicate removal (DR) operation is added to improve algorithm performance. The proposed PCPS/DR-NSDE is faster than traditional algorithms and has optimal hypervolume and coverage-metric (C-metric) indicators. The procedures for further obtaining desired solutions in the Pareto front are discussed. The impact of practical constraints and target impedance is also analyzed. This work provides a collaborative optimization and analysis of jitter, noise, and impedance in 2.5-D systems.
items.abstract_zh: 在基于中介层的 2.5 维异构系统中使用模块化小芯片简化了制造和设计，但也带来了重大的噪声挑战。本文介绍了 2.5 维集成电路 (IC) 中的协作抖动感知优化，其中结合了电源感应抖动 (PSIJ)、系统阻抗、目标阻抗和去耦电容器，基于混合预计算和预存储/去重非支配排序差分进化 (PCPS/DR-NSDE) 算法。提出了自动通道模型算法和统一的去耦电容放置策略以提高设计效率。然后，对系统传输阻抗、同步开关电流、灵敏度函数和放大系数进行单独建模，从而在 2.5 维系统中组装和验证最终的 PSIJ。提出了预计算和预存储（PCPS）策略来处理目标函数中的高耗时模块，并添加重复删除（DR）操作以提高算法性能。所提出的 PCPS/DR-NSDE 比传统算法更快，并且具有最佳的超体积和覆盖度量（C 度量）指标。讨论了在帕累托前沿进一步获得所需解的过程。还分析了实际约束和目标阻抗的影响。这项工作提供了 2.5 维系统中抖动、噪声和阻抗的协作优化和分析。

items.title: A Verification Framework for Time-Triggered Networks Based on Timed Colored Petri Net.
items.abstract: Time-triggered (TT) network provides a low-cost service to meet the strong demand of modern industry networks for real-time communication. Both simulation and reachability analysis provide effective research methods for TT networks. This article presents a verification framework for the TT network based on timed colored Petri nets (TCPNs). We propose an automatic formal modeling method for the behavior of message transmissions in the TT network. We harness timed multisets of TCPN to model and analyze TT message transmission latencies. For a holistic system evaluation, we characterize the critical system properties, such as boundedness and liveness. We substantiate the properties by the reachability analysis. We demonstrate the effectiveness through a case study by simulating the message transmission and reachability analysis in the state space. Finally, we analyze the influencing factors of the state space in the automotive scenario. The proposed automatic modeling method can effectively reduce the state space scale.
items.abstract_zh: 时间触发（TT）网络提供低成本的服务，满足现代工业网络对实时通信的强烈需求。仿真和可达性分析都为TT网络提供了有效的研究方法。本文提出了一个基于定时彩色 Petri 网 (TCPN) 的 TT 网络验证框架。我们提出了一种针对 TT 网络中消息传输行为的自动形式建模方法。我们利用 TCPN 的定时多重集来建模和分析 TT 消息传输延迟。对于整体系统评估，我们描述了关键系统属性，例如有界性和活跃性。我们通过可达性分析来证实这些属性。我们通过案例研究通过模拟状态空间中的消息传输和可达性分析来证明其有效性。最后，我们分析了汽车场景中状态空间的影响因素。所提出的自动建模方法可以有效地减小状态空间尺度。

items.title: A Fully Pipelined Reconfigurable Montgomery Modular Multiplier Supporting Variable Bit-Widths.
items.abstract: Recently, there has been increased emphasis on privacy-preserving computation technologies, such as homomorphic encryption (HE) and zero-knowledge proof (ZKP). Modular multiplication is a critical component for both HE and ZKP. Variable bit-width is a must for many applications of privacy-preserving computation, due to variable bit-width requirements for different cryptography schemes. However, the majority of modular multipliers that support variable bit-width configurations exhibit relatively low throughput. This work presents a fully pipelined Montgomery modular multiplier with variable bit-width support. Truncated multipliers are introduced to reduce the resources of modular multipliers in our approach. In order to meet different bit-width requirements, the proposed modular multiplier can be dynamically reconfigured. The proposed design can support widely used bit-width configurations, specifically, 384-bit, 256-bit, and 128-bit. 256-bit and 128-bit modes support parallel computation of 2 and 6 sets of operands, respectively. Compared with existing variable bit-width modular multipliers, the proposed reconfigurable modular multiplier significantly improves the throughputs with even lower resources.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，人们越来越重视隐私保护计算技术，例如同态加密（HE）和零知识证明（ZKP）。模乘法是 HE 和 ZKP 的关键组成部分。由于不同加密方案的可变位宽要求，可变位宽对于隐私保护计算的许多应用来说是必须的。然而，大多数支持可变位宽配置的模块化乘法器表现出相对较低的吞吐量。这项工作提出了一个完全流水线化的蒙哥马利模块化乘法器，具有可变位宽支持。在我们的方法中引入截断乘法器是为了减少模乘法器的资源。为了满足不同位宽的要求，所提出的模块化乘法器可以动态地重新配置。所提出的设计可以支持广泛使用的位宽配置，特别是384位、256位和128位。 256位和128位模式分别支持2组和6组操作数的并行计算。与现有的可变位宽模块化乘法器相比，所提出的可重构模块化乘法器以更少的资源显着提高了吞吐量。

items.title: ISA Extensions of Shuffling Against Side-Channel Attacks.
items.abstract: Shuffling is a time-randomized countermeasure against side-channel attacks. To achieve effective protections, shuffling is usually combined with other countermeasures, such as the masking. It requires the shuffling to be as efficient as possible. In this work, we describe an instruction set extensions (ISEs) for shuffling countermeasure. Our ISEs focuses on the generation of random permutations, which is the most difficult part to deploy the shuffling in microprocessors. The Thorp shuffling is implemented in hardware, enabling the instruction to generate random permutations. We design new ISEs compatible to the RISC-V standard instruction set format. Then, we present applications of our ISEs by giving two combinations of shuffling and masking, which can be regarded as promising software–hardware co-designs of side-channel countermeasures. At last, we embed the ISEs to the RISC-V core called tinyriscv, and evaluate the silicon overhead and the side-channel security of the shuffled masked AND operation. The evaluation shows that the new instruction can significantly improve the security of masking countermeasures.
items.abstract_zh: 洗牌是一种针对侧信道攻击的时间随机对策。为了实现有效的保护，洗牌通常与其他对策（例如掩蔽）相结合。它要求洗牌尽可能高效。在这项工作中，我们描述了一种用于洗牌对策的指令集扩展（ISE）。我们的 ISE 专注于随机排列的生成，这是在微处理器中部署改组最困难的部分。 Thorp 洗牌是在硬件中实现的，使指令能够生成随机排列。我们设计了与 RISC-V 标准指令集格式兼容的新 ISE。然后，我们通过给出混洗和掩码的两种组合来展示我们的 ISE 的应用，这可以被视为有前途的侧信道对抗的软硬件协同设计。最后，我们将 ISE 嵌入到称为tinyriscv 的 RISC-V 内核中，并评估混洗屏蔽 AND 运算的硅开销和侧通道安全性。评估表明，新指令可以显着提高掩蔽对策的安全性。

items.title: DyBit: Dynamic Bit-Precision Numbers for Efficient Quantized Neural Network Inference.
items.abstract: To accelerate the inference of deep neural networks (DNNs), quantization with low-bitwidth numbers is actively researched. A prominent challenge is to quantize the DNN models into low-bitwidth numbers without significant accuracy degradation, especially at very low bitwidths ( < 8 bits). This work targets an adaptive data representation with variable-length encoding called DyBit. DyBit can dynamically adjust the precision and range of separate bit-fields to be adapted to the DNN weights/activations distribution. We also propose a hardware-aware quantization framework with a mixed-precision accelerator to tradeoff the inference accuracy and speedup. Experimental results demonstrate that the ImageNet inference accuracy via DyBit is 1.97% higher than the state-of-the-art at 4-bit quantization, and the proposed framework can achieve up to 8.1× speedup compared with the original ResNet-50 model.
items.abstract_zh: 为了加速深度神经网络 (DNN) 的推理，人们正在积极研究低位宽数字的量化。一个突出的挑战是将 DNN 模型量化为低位宽数字，而不会显着降低精度，尤其是在非常低的位宽时 ( $8.1× $ 加速。

items.title: CoFS: A Collaboration-Aware Fairness Scheme for NVMe SSD in Cloud Storage System.
items.abstract: Since cloud service providers adopt the sharing mode to improve the utilization of solid state drives (SSDs) and reduce management costs, fairness is a critical design consideration and has drawn great interest in recent years. There are many methods to achieve fairness at the SSD device level, including cache-based resource allocation and queue rescheduling of transaction scheduling unit (TSU). However, poor locality data in cloud environments makes these methods of achieving fairness through the cache level invalid. In addition, existing fairness approaches at the TSU level treat flash memory as a black box and do not consider some characteristics of flash memory, leading to room for performance improvement. In this work, we propose a novel collaborative SSD fairness scheme, named a coordinated SSD cache and TSU fair scheme (CoFS), that achieves end-to-end full path fairness at the device level. A reinforcement learning-assisted fairness management scheme is designed to coordinate the SSD cache and TSU considering both the cache space and bandwidth resources which are significant for fairness control. The key idea is to enable the front-end SSD cache to achieve workload-level fairness by recognizing workload patterns, while the back-end TSU achieves flash-level fairness by sensing SSD internal status. Finally, CoFS collaborates with them to achieve SSD device-level fairness. In addition, we have designed a flexible reward function mechanism in the cache to balance different optimization objectives and augment TSU queue scheduling to adapt to different types of SSDs. Experimental results show that CoFS improves the overall fairness and performance by 30.8% to 56.7% and 42.1% to 98.7% in different scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 由于云服务提供商采用共享模式来提高固态硬盘（SSD）的利用率并降低管理成本，因此公平性是一个关键的设计考虑因素，并且近年来引起了人们的极大兴趣。在SSD设备层面实现公平性的方法有很多，包括基于缓存的资源分配和事务调度单元（TSU）的队列重新调度。然而，云环境中较差的局部性数据使得这些通过缓存级别实现公平性的方法无效。此外，现有TSU级别的公平性方法将闪存视为黑匣子，没有考虑闪存的某些特性，导致性能提升的空间。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的协作SSD公平方案，称为协调SSD缓存和TSU公平方案（CoFS），它在设备级别实现了端到端的全路径公平性。考虑到对公平性控制至关重要的缓存空间和带宽资源，设计了一种强化学习辅助的公平管理方案来协调SSD缓存和TSU。关键思想是使前端SSD缓存通过识别工作负载模式来实现工作负载级公平性，而后端TSU通过感知SSD内部状态来实现闪存级公平性。最后CoFS与他们合作实现了SSD设备级的公平性。此外，我们在缓存中设计了灵活的奖励函数机制来平衡不同的优化目标，并增强TSU队列调度以适应不同类型的SSD。实验结果表明，CoFS在不同场景下整体公平性和性能分别提升了30.8%~56.7%和42.1%~98.7%。

items.title: A Fast SIE Solver With Cut Set Analysis and Terminals as Supernodes for Interconnects.
items.abstract: A magnetic quasi-static (MQS) surface integral equation (SIE) formulation based on the cut set analysis (CSA) is proposed to extract parameters of interconnects in packages. The surface impedance approximation is used to describe the surface current caused by skin effect at high frequencies. To accurately model arbitrarily shaped structures, triangle meshes are selected to discretize surfaces of interconnects in the proposed formulation. After physically interpreting the discretized matrix equation as a circuit, the CSA is tailored to carefully apply the charge conservation condition. Triangles on each terminal are bounded together as a supernode to enforce currents flowing into/out interconnects. In addition, an efficient preconditioner and the precorrected Fast Fourier Transform (pFFT) are used to accelerate the convergence and matrix-vector product. Four numerical examples were carried out to validate the effectiveness by comparing it with the industrial solver. Our results show that the proposed formulation is accurate, efficient, and flexible to model complex interconnects at high frequencies.
items.abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于割集分析（CSA）的磁准静态（MQS）表面积分方程（SIE）公式来提取封装中互连的参数。表面阻抗近似用于描述高频下集肤效应引起的表面电流。为了准确地建模任意形状的结构，选择三角形网格来离散所提出的公式中的互连表面。将离散矩阵方程物理解释为电路后，CSA 被定制为仔细应用电荷守恒条件。每个端子上的三角形作为超级节点连接在一起，以强制电流流入/流出互连。此外，还使用高效的预处理器和预校正快速傅立叶变换 (pFFT) 来加速收敛和矩阵向量乘积。通过与工业求解器的比较，通过四个数值算例验证了其有效性。我们的结果表明，所提出的公式准确、高效且灵活，可以对高频下的复杂互连进行建模。

items.title: High-Performance Placement Engine for Modern Large-Scale FPGAs With Heterogeneity and Clock Constraints.
items.abstract: As field-programmable gate array (FPGA) architectures continue to evolve and become more complex, the heterogeneity and clock constraints imposed by modern FPGAs have posed significant challenges to FPGA placement. This article proposes a high-performance placement engine for modern large-scale FPGAs with heterogeneity and clock constraints. To improve efficiency and scalability, we develop a clustering method considering both internal/external connectivity and the balance of block types to build the hierarchy. In each hierarchy level, we propose a hybrid penalty and augmented Lagrangian method (HPALM) to convert the FPGA global placement with heterogeneity and clock constraints into a series of unconstrained optimization subproblems, then use the Adam method to solve each subproblem. In particular, we prove that the HPALM is globally convergent for global placement. Besides, a matching-based IP block legalization is developed to legalize the DSPs and RAMs, and a multistage packing is presented to cluster LUTs and FFs into HCLBs. Finally, we propose a history-based legalization to legalize CLBs in an FPGA, and a simulated-annealing-based detailed placement is presented to reduce the wirelength while maintaining legality. Compared with the state-of-the-art works, experimental results based on the ISPD 2017 contest benchmarks show that the proposed algorithm can achieve the shortest routed wirelength in a reasonable runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 架构不断发展并变得更加复杂，现代 FPGA 所施加的异构性和时钟限制对 FPGA 布局提出了重大挑战。本文提出了一种适用于具有异构性和时钟约束的现代大规模 FPGA 的高性能布局引擎。为了提高效率和可扩展性，我们开发了一种考虑内部/外部连接性和块类型平衡的聚类方法来构建层次结构。在每个层级中，我们提出了混合惩罚和增强拉格朗日方法（HPALM），将具有异构性和时钟约束的FPGA全局布局转换为一系列无约束优化子问题，然后使用Adam方法求解每个子问题。特别是，我们证明 HPALM 对于全局布局是全局收敛的。此外，还开发了基于匹配的IP块合法化来使DSP和RAM合法化，并且提出了多级打包以将LUT和FF聚集成HCLB。最后，我们提出了一种基于历史的合法化来使 FPGA 中的 CLB 合法化，并提出了一种基于模拟退火的详细布局，以在保持合法性的同时减少线长。与最先进的作品相比，基于ISPD 2017竞赛基准的实验结果表明，所提出的算法可以在合理的运行时间内实现最短的布线长度。

items.title: L2O-ILT: Learning to Optimize Inverse Lithography Techniques.
items.abstract: Inverse lithography technique (ILT) is one of the most widely used resolution enhancement techniques (RETs) to compensate for the diffraction effect in the lithography process. However, ILT suffers from runtime overhead issues with the shrinking size of technology nodes. In this article, our proposed L2O-ILT framework unrolls the iterative ILT optimization algorithm into a learnable neural network with high interpretability, which can generate a high-quality initial mask for fast refinement. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves better performance on both mask printability and runtime than the previous methods.
items.abstract_zh: 逆光刻技术（ILT）是最广泛使用的分辨率增强技术（RET）之一，用于补偿光刻过程中的衍射效应。然而，随着技术节点规模的缩小，ILT 面临着运行时开销问题。在本文中，我们提出的 L2O-ILT 框架将迭代 ILT 优化算法展开为具有高可解释性的可学习神经网络，可以生成高质量的初始掩模以进行快速细化。实验结果表明，我们的方法在掩模可印刷性和运行时间方面都比以前的方法取得了更好的性能。

items.title: Context-Aware Graceful Degradation for Mixed-Criticality Scheduling in Autonomous Systems.
items.abstract: Autonomous systems are of high complexity and often regarded as mixed-criticality systems (MCSs) in which functions are allocated criticality levels according to risk assessment based on safety standards. Typically, tasks have different real-time requirements across criticality levels, and the estimated worst-case execution times (WCETs) are distinct. Further, limitations in computational resources increase the difficulty of integrating tasks onto one shared hardware platform. Conventionally, all nonsafety critical tasks must be discarded or suspended to guarantee the execution of safety-critical tasks when facing a timing fault. This typically leads to a considerable decrease in the system’s Quality-of-Service (QoS). Achieving more graceful degradation is critical to minimizing QoS reduction. This work focuses on tackling timing faults and proposes a novel graceful degradation strategy for use in a mixed-criticality context. Thus, when a system has multiple operational modes depending on the environment or an operational task, our approach can give an effective way of managing degradation to maximize QoS, which is currently not sufficiently recognized in MCS. Furthermore, the proposed causality analysis-based degradation process “bridges the gap” so functional dependencies are considered in scheduling design and thus leads to a graceful degradation that is both feasible and reasonable in functional and nonfunctional terms. The evaluations show that QoS can be better preserved using the proposed context-aware degradation process when compared with more conventional MCS scheduling approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 自治系统具有很高的复杂性，通常被视为混合关键性系统（MCS），其中根据基于安全标准的风险评估来分配功能的关键性级别。通常，不同关键级别的任务具有不同的实时要求，并且估计的最坏情况执行时间 (WCET) 也不同。此外，计算资源的限制增加了将任务集成到一个共享硬件平台上的难度。传统上，当遇到定时故障时，必须丢弃或暂停所有非安全关键任务，以保证安全关键任务的执行。这通常会导致系统的服务质量 (QoS) 大幅下降。实现更优雅的降级对于最大限度地减少 QoS 下降至关重要。这项工作的重点是解决时序错误，并提出了一种在混合关键性环境中使用的新颖的优雅降级策略。因此，当系统根据环境或操作任务具有多种操作模式时，我们的方法可以提供一种有效的方法来管理降级以最大化 QoS，这目前在 MCS 中尚未得到充分认识。此外，所提出的基于因果分析的退化过程“弥合了差距”，因此在调度设计中考虑了功能依赖性，从而导致在功能和非功能方面既可行又合理的优雅退化。评估表明，与更传统的 MCS 调度方法相比，使用所提出的上下文感知降级过程可以更好地保留 QoS。

items.title: TDPP: 2-D Permutation-Based Protection of Memristive Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: The execution of deep neural network (DNN) algorithms suffers from significant bottlenecks due to the separation of the processing and memory units in traditional computer systems. Emerging memristive computing systems introduce an in situ approach that overcomes this bottleneck. The nonvolatility of memristive devices, however, may expose the DNN weights stored in memristive crossbars to potential theft attacks. Therefore, this article proposes a 2-D permutation-based protection (TDPP) method that thwarts such attacks. We first introduce the underlying concept that motivates the TDPP method: permuting both the rows and columns of the DNN weight matrices. This contrasts with previous methods, which focused solely on permuting a single dimension of the weight matrices, either the rows or columns. While it is possible for an adversary to access the matrix values, the original arrangement of rows and columns in the matrices remains concealed. As a result, the extracted DNN model from the accessed matrix values would fail to operate correctly. We consider two different memristive computing systems (designed for layer-by-layer and layer-parallel processing, respectively), and demonstrate the design of the TDPP method that could be embedded into the two systems. Finally, we present a security analysis. Our experiments demonstrate that TDPP can achieve comparable effectiveness to prior approaches, with a high level of security when appropriately parameterized. In addition, TDPP is more scalable than previous methods and results in reduced area and power overheads. The area and power are reduced by, respectively, 1218× and 2815× for the layer-by-layer system and by 178× and 203× for the layer-parallel system compared to prior works.
items.abstract_zh: 由于传统计算机系统中处理单元和存储单元的分离，深度神经网络（DNN）算法的执行遇到了严重的瓶颈。新兴的忆阻计算系统引入了一种克服这一瓶颈的原位方法。然而，忆阻设备的非易失性可能会使存储在忆阻交叉开关中的 DNN 权重遭受潜在的盗窃攻击。因此，本文提出了一种基于二维排列的保护（TDPP）方法来阻止此类攻击。我们首先介绍推动 TDPP 方法的基本概念：排列 DNN 权重矩阵的行和列。这与以前的方法形成鲜明对比，以前的方法仅专注于排列权重矩阵的单个维度（行或列）。虽然攻击者有可能访问矩阵值，但矩阵中行和列的原始排列仍然被隐藏。因此，从访问的矩阵值中提取的 DNN 模型将无法正确运行。我们考虑了两种不同的忆阻计算系统（分别设计用于逐层和层并行处理），并演示了可以嵌入到这两个系统中的 TDPP 方法的设计。最后，我们进行安全分析。我们的实验表明，TDPP 可以实现与先前方法相当的有效性，并且在适当参数化时具有高水平的安全性。此外，TDPP 比以前的方法更具可扩展性，并可减少面积和功率开销。面积和功率分别减少 1218× 和 2815× 用于逐层系统和 178× 和 203× 与之前的作品相比，层并行系统。

items.title: PowerSyn: A Logic Synthesis Framework With Early Power Optimization.
items.abstract: Power is a great concern in integrated circuits (ICs) design flow, especially in portable devices. As an early stage in electronic design automation (EDA), logic synthesis can significantly affect the quality of the design. It is essential to optimize power in logic synthesis. However, logic synthesis only has a limited concern in power due to its inaccurate estimation. This is because critical physical information is missing at this stage. Furthermore, the empirical optimization sequences need enhancement, and they are not optimal for power, while optimizing power in the early stage is effective. Technology mapping can also improve power optimization with comprehensive power metrics in this sub-15 nm era. Therefore, we propose PowerSyn, a logic synthesis framework with early power optimization. It consists of a practical power model, a power-oriented logic optimization module, and a technology mapping stage. The power model leverages probability propagation considering glitches and static power. The acrlong RL-based logic optimization generates high-quality and rapid-convergence command sequence with early power optimization. We also modify traditional technology mapping with novel power-related metrics. We evaluate PowerSyn on the EPFL benchmark suite. Experiment results show that our flow achieves an average power savings of 16.1% compared to the state-of-the-art open-source logic optimization flow. It also delivers an 8.8% and a 2.1% reduction in latency and area, respectively. The flow incurs less than 12.2% execution time overhead during inference for command generation.
items.abstract_zh: 功耗是集成电路 (IC) 设计流程中的一个重要问题，尤其是在便携式设备中。作为电子设计自动化 (EDA) 的早期阶段，逻辑综合可以显着影响设计的质量。优化逻辑综合中的功耗至关重要。然而，由于其估计不准确，逻辑综合对功耗的关注有限。这是因为在此阶段缺少关键的物理信息。此外，经验优化序列需要增强，并且它们对于功率而言并不是最优的，而早期的功率优化是有效的。技术映射还可以通过 15 纳米以下时代的综合功耗指标来改进功耗优化。因此，我们提出了PowerSyn，一种具有早期功耗优化的逻辑综合框架。它由实用功耗模型、面向功耗的逻辑优化模块和技术映射阶段组成。功率模型利用考虑毛刺和静态功率的概率传播。基于 RL 的 acrlong 逻辑优化可通过早期功耗优化生成高质量且快速收敛的命令序列。我们还使用新颖的与功率相关的指标来修改传统的技术映射。我们在 EPFL 基准套件上评估 PowerSyn。实验结果表明，与最先进的开源逻辑优化流程相比，我们的流程平均节能 16.1%。它还使延迟和面积分别减少了 8.8% 和 2.1%。在命令生成的推理过程中，该流程产生的执行时间开销不到 12.2%。

items.title: Performance- and Energy-Aware Gait-Based User Authentication With Intermittent Computation for IoT Devices.
items.abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) makes it possible to utilize a multitude of small- and medium-scale devices allowing for increased functionality in flexible networks. However, user authentication on IoT devices is as important as it can be challenging. Due to limitations on the available energy, interface, and processing power, IoT devices can be the weakest link in their networks. Multiple authentication techniques have been developed to address these challenges. However, the existing techniques are limited in terms of performance, overheads, and efficiency. In contrast, our proposed authentication method uses a user’s walking gait as an input, because gait is unique to every user and can be collected using low-power inertial sensors found on all handheld devices. Our authentication method uses a lightweight neural network (NN) which is further complimented with early exits to further optimize computational cost(s). We also propose reinforcement learning that considers the energy consumption to dynamically determine which of the exits should be chosen to strike a balance between performance and computational and energy cost. Though effective, one of the challenges with IoT devices is their power supply such as dependence on batteries. Discharge of the battery or any other interruptions can lead to recomputations, which are expensive on already limited battery-operated IoT devices. To address such challenges, especially for user authorization, we introduce intermittent computation to our proposed authentication framework. Intermittent computation can store the state of the NNs at checkpoints. In the case of power disruption, the execution will be resumed from the saved checkpoints instead of performing the whole execution. Most implementations of intermittent computation take place at the compiler level, which makes for a very efficient design, however, that also makes them hardware specific. Our method is implemented on software and is hardware-agnostic, allowing us to create checkpoints to save and retrieve the authentication framework state, in case of power interruption. The proposed authentication framework can authenticate users with up to more than 85% accuracy and can save up to 34% of computations due to the proposed intermittent computing.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 使得利用大量中小型设备成为可能，从而在灵活的网络中增加功能。然而，物联网设备上的用户身份验证既重要又具有挑战性。由于可用能源、接口和处理能力的限制，物联网设备可能是其网络中最薄弱的环节。已经开发了多种身份验证技术来应对这些挑战。然而，现有技术在性能、开销和效率方面受到限制。相比之下，我们提出的身份验证方法使用用户的步行步态作为输入，因为步态对于每个用户来说都是独一无二的，并且可以使用所有手持设备上的低功耗惯性传感器进行收集。我们的身份验证方法使用轻量级神经网络（NN），该网络进一步与早期退出相结合，以进一步优化计算成本。我们还提出强化学习，考虑能源消耗来动态确定应该选择哪些出口，以在性能、计算和能源成本之间取得平衡。尽管有效，但物联网设备面临的挑战之一是其电源，例如对电池的依赖。电池放电或任何其他中断都可能导致重新计算，这对于已经有限的电池供电物联网设备来说成本高昂。为了解决这些挑战，特别是用户授权方面的挑战，我们在我们提出的身份验证框架中引入了间歇性计算。间歇计算可以存储检查点处神经网络的状态。在电源中断的情况下，将从保存的检查点恢复执行，而不是执行整个执行。大多数间歇计算的实现都是在编译器级别进行的，这使得设计非常高效，但是，这也使得它们特定于硬件。我们的方法是在软件上实现的，并且与硬件无关，允许我们创建检查点来保存和检索身份验证框架状态，以防电源中断。所提出的身份验证框架可以以高达 85% 以上的准确率对用户进行身份验证，并且由于所提出的间歇计算，可以节省高达 34% 的计算量。
